RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Son beş yıl içinde yapılan denetimlerle ilgili hem bir yandan idari para cezaları uygulanmakta hem de kayıt dışı tespit edilen sigortalılar ve iş yerleri kayıt altına alınmaktadır.
Sayın Başkanım, değerli milletvekilleri; vatandaşlarının neredeyse tamamını genel sağlık sigortası şemsiyesine almış bir ülkeyiz. Bu bilinçle sağlık alanında da pek çok hizmeti yerine getirmeye, vatandaşlarımızın sağlık hizmetlerine eşit şartlarda erişimini sağlamaya devam ediyoruz. Sağlık sigortacılığı bakımından birçok ülkenin örnek aldığı bir noktaya gelen Çalışma ve Sosyal Güvenlik Bakanlığımız ve SGK bu anlamda gerek salgın döneminde gerek deprem döneminde büyük bir özveriyle
çalışmalarını devam ettirmiştir.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Bakanın işini Bakana mı anlatıyorsun?
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Kardeşim, dinlersen anlarsın, öğrenirsin!
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - Sana anlatıyor ama anlamamakta direniyorsunuz.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Resul Bey, lütfen selamlama yaparsanız...
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Başkanım...
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Resul Bey, lütfen tamamlayalım.
OKAN KONURALP (Ankara) - Sayın Bakanım, size büyük bir ayıp yapılıyor burada!
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Yirmi iki yılda yaptığımız şeyleri anlatıyor ya!
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Hâlen 81 ilde...

RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Başkanım, bir ek süre alabilir miyim?
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Ek süre verdim, lütfen... Bir daha ek süre verdim.
Lütfen, tamamlayalım.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Ücret Garanti Fonu kapsamında ilk ödemenin yapıldığı 2005 yılından 2024 Eylül ayına kadar 160.098 kişiye toplam 631 milyon ödeme yapılmıştır. Hâlen 81 ilde 101 birimde "İş Kulüpleri Projesi'yle, dezavantajlı gruplar için; kadınlar, engelliler, gençler, Roman vatandaşlar, uzun süreli işsizler, madde bağımlıları için özel politika gerektiren vatandaşlarımıza yönelik iş ve istihdam amaçlı çalışmalar devam ettirilmektedir.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Kurt, lütfen tamamlayalım; süreniz doldu, 2 kere uzattım.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Son olarak, deprem bölgesine çok destek sağlandı, bu desteklerin uzatılması bölge açısından önem arz ediyor. Bu kapsamda, Sayın Bakanımızdan desteklerini istirham ediyorum ve değerli hazırunu saygıyla selamlıyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Dear President, esteemed members of our Planning and Budget Commission, Dear Minister, esteemed bureaucrats, esteemed members of the press; I respectfully greet all of you on behalf of my party regarding the budget of the Ministry of Labor and Social Security for 2025.
On the one hand, the Ministry of Labor and Social Security has great importance in terms of working life, health, social security, economic and social aspects, and social security is the most fundamental right of every individual from cradle to grave. The social security system in Türkiye took on a more institutional structure than the structure in the Ottoman Period with the Workers' Insurance Institution established in 1946. With the establishment of the Social Security Institution in 2006, the social security system became more modern and comprehensive and equal rights were provided for 4/A, 4/B and 4/C insured people. social insurance system,
By securing basic rights such as retirement, health insurance and unemployment benefits, it ensures that employees have economic security, and on the other hand, it allows them to be covered in terms of health with occupational accidents, occupational diseases, sickness and maternity insurance. The Social Security Institution covers the expenses of the insured and the institution, including retirees' old-age pensions and health expenses, with the premiums it collects. Significant progress has been made in the comprehensiveness and effectiveness of the social security system. All employees are included in the social insurance system and can benefit from basic social rights such as retirement, health services and unemployment insurance.
The aging of the population in Türkiye and the decrease in the young population in the labor market puts a burden on the social security system. As the number of employees decreases, the number of retired people increases, making the financial sustainability of the system difficult. A quality and sustainable working life, labor peace and social security system are one of the most important elements that will carry our country into the future and enable our society to look to the future with more confidence.
Fighting unregistered employment more effectively both ensures that employees benefit from their social security rights and improves the financial situation of the social security system. Türkiye's creation of a stronger and more sustainable social security system in the future will strengthen labor peace and make significant contributions to the country's economy. In this context, steps such as preventing unregistered employment, expanding social security rights and ensuring the financial sustainability of the system are of great importance.
Maintaining labor peace, strengthening employment by preventing unemployment, and improving working life in cooperation with unions and all other social stakeholders have been one of the main goals of our AK Party governments since 2002. Along with the 2025 budget, right steps will continue to be taken in the coming period with the work to be carried out by the Ministry of Labor and Social Security with the vision of the Türkiye Century.

Dear Minister, on this occasion, many buildings and workplaces were destroyed in Adıyaman, my constituency and my hometown, which was greatly damaged by the "February 6, disaster of the millennium", and under the leadership of our President, Mr. Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, 17 thousand houses were delivered in our city in a short time like one year, and the delivery of all houses and workplaces is planned in 2025. There is a great need to overhaul the Social Security Institution Provincial Directorate building and the buildings in our districts, which were heavily damaged and demolished due to the earthquake in Adıyaman, and to rebuild our Provincial Directorate building due to its demolition. We expect that both our SSI Provincial Directorate and the Provincial Directorate of Labor and Employment Institution building, which is moderately damaged and currently out of use, will be put into service again and make a great contribution to the normalization of our city. It is important to complete the SSI Provincial Directorate and the Provincial Directorate of Labor and Employment Institution buildings, which serve the society in general, as soon as possible in terms of providing service to our employers, insured people, retirees and financial advisors, and we expect your support.
Dear MPs, first of all, I would like to provide some information about the Social Security Institution, which is one of the leading relevant institutions of our Ministry of Labor and Social Security and where I served as chief inspector and manager for many years. Social Security Institution continues its services with the awareness of its responsibilities as an innovative and exemplary institution that strives to provide citizen-oriented services in many areas such as health, social security, promotion of registered employment, retirement and technology. As a result of the policies implemented, the positive developments in indicators such as the ratio of premium income to cover pensions and health expenses, the ratio of social security deficit to gross domestic product, and asset-liability ratio clearly show that we are taking determined steps towards the goal of a financially sustainable social security system. In this context, the Social Security Institution
I would like to briefly touch upon its financial structure: Dear MPs, despite the expansion of social security coverage, the increase in the diversity of SSI services, and the increase in social security expenditures, our social security system has reached a financially sustainable structure after the reforms. Therefore, interpreting and analyzing numerical quantities correctly will show us where we really are.
The total revenues of the Social Security Institution amounted to 2 trillion 193 billion TL in 2023. Total revenues in the nine-month period of 2024 were approximately 2.9 trillion, and total revenues are expected to be 3.8 trillion at the end of 2024. Social Security Institution takes all necessary steps to increase institutional revenues and strengthen premium collection.
The total expenses of the Social Security Institution were approximately 2.2 trillion TL in 2023, and total expenses in the nine-month period of 2024 were approximately 2.9 trillion. We expect total expenses to be approximately 4 trillion by the end of 2024.

The increases in pensions in 2024 were higher than expected, the increases in minimum salaries and holiday bonuses, the pensions, retirement and holiday bonuses paid due to the EYT application that came into force in March 2023, and the increases in health expenditures due to unforeseen changes have led to an increase in SSI expenses.
The income-expenditure balance was realized as 39.4 billion TL in 2023. In the nine-month period of 2024, the Social Security Institution deficit was 17.6 billion TL. The deficit is expected to be 170.5 billion TL by the end of 2024, depending on changes in income and expenses.
As it is known, from one year to the next, differences occur between the periods when payments are made due to minimum wage, growth, inflation, pension increases and various legislative changes that create financial impact. For this reason, it is important to evaluate the financial structure of the Social Security Institution through comparable real indicators such as the ratio of revenues to expenses and the ratio of the SSI deficit to gross domestic product, rather than nominal amounts. In order to better understand this situation, it is necessary to provide information about the financial structure of the social security system through some comparable basic indicators. The ratio of revenues to expenses is also one of the main indicators used to explain the trend in the financial structure of SSI. While the ratio of revenues to expenses was 71.5 percent in 2002, it is expected to be 95.7 percent in 2024. The ratio of revenues to expenses is expected to be 95.7 percent by the end of 2024, with the impact of factors that cause changes in revenues and expenses such as the postponement of premiums due to the earthquakes, which we call "the disaster of the millennium" in Kahramanmaraş, the increase of minimum salaries and holiday bonuses, and the EYT regulation.
While the ratio of premium income, which is the performance indicator of the Social Security Institution, to cover pensions and health expenses was 60.9 percent in 2002, it is expected to be 74.8 percent by the end of 2024.
Another important indicator showing the financial sustainability of the social security system is the ratio of the social security system deficit to gross domestic product, which was 2.2 percent in 2002 and is expected to be 0.39 by the end of 2024.
The number of applications received within the scope of EYT to date is approximately 2.3 million. The examination of the applications in question and the monthly payment processing processes were completed in a short time with great dedication and intense efforts of the SSI staff, and to date, approximately 2.3 million insured people have been paid monthly within the scope of EYT.

While in the normal process around 450 thousand insured people can retire in a year, this
On behalf of both our insured and their families, I would like to thank our SSI staff, who ensured that 2.3 million insured people received their pensions in more than a year, and who, with their devoted work in the EYT monthly payment process, worked day and night to ensure that the insured people received their pensions without causing any inconvenience during their retirement processes. They really helped us get through this process with great dedication, thank you very much.
Dear MPs, another important indicator for us is the increase in the number of insured people. The increases observed in the number of active insured people during this period are of great importance for the social security system. We see that our country's economy is strengthening and the number of active insured people of the Social Security Institution is increasing. When we evaluate the number of active insured people from 2002 to the present, there has been an increase of 148 percent as of June 2024 figures. The number of active insured people, which was 12 million in 2002, reached 25.1 million as of June 2024, and the number of retirees from 6.6 million reached 16.4 million as of June 2024.
It should be particularly noted that pensions vary according to the number of premium days paid by the insured and the premium-based earnings reported to the Social Security Institution during the periods they worked. Currently, the lowest SSK pension is 12,500 TL, while the highest SSK pension is around 81,400 TL. This is due to the differences in the number of premium days paid and premium base, and in this context, the pensions of those with a high number of premium days and high earnings are much higher.
When the active-passive insurance numbers are examined according to insurance status over the years as a result of the developments in the social security system, the active-passive ratio has been in the range of 1.78 to 2 since 2006. In December 2022, the asset-liability ratio was 2.01, and as of June 2024, due to EYT changes, this ratio was 1.76.
The number of workplaces employing SSK workers, which was 727,409 in 2002, increased to 2 million 191 thousand 292 as of August 2024. Here there is an increase of approximately 3 times. With the regulations made as of the beginning of 2022, minimum wage has been excluded from tax.
Yes, the exclusion of incomes up to the minimum wage from taxation, which I wrote about in my doctoral thesis - ten years ago - and always mentioned in my newspaper articles and television programs, is a reform, a revolution. With the regulation made at the beginning of 2022, 188 billion TL will be paid in 2022, including 178 billion TL as income tax and 10.1 billion TL as stamp duty; In 2023, a total of 385 billion stamp and income taxes were waived. In 2024, the total amount of income and stamp duty waived by the state in terms of income tax is 677.3 billion; In 2025, this figure will be 853 billion TL in total, and by not collecting stamp and income tax on workers, 853 billion will remain in the pockets of our workers in 2025.
What we are in and what is happening in this sense with the work carried out and the services offered in the field of social insurance.

On the one hand, in the war zone, Russia-Ukraine, there is a big problem in our north; Again, there are tensions in the east between Iran, Israel and America; There is serious turmoil in Syria to our south and Israel-Lebanon, Israel-Palestine.
There is a serious genocide taking place among people, and within the context of the geography we are in, it is of course important that our economic and social policies are taken very carefully and steps are taken to strengthen our country's economy.
While the Social Security Institution carries out its work on pensions and health for the insured, it has also made a digital transformation. Twenty-twenty-five years ago, when I was an inspector at the Social Security Institution, you can see where you worked, at which workplace, at which registry number, how many days you worked, how many days of premiums were paid, how much premiums were paid, day, night, on the day and time you want, on your mobile phone, from a period when you could not even know where and how many days you worked, unless you went for a day report and donated 5 thousand liras to the SSK Directorate with the money of that period.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - They don't call it "donation", they call it something else.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Mr. Cavit, please. You're welcome. I am not interfering with you, and neither should you.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - I am not saying intervention, but its legal definition.
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - Listen, learn! You will learn! Please, do not intervene.

CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - There is no need to get angry.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Why are you shouting, I don't understand that!
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - You will learn! You will learn too!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - What will I learn, you will learn.
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - Learn! Learn! Learn! Learn! Learn too! It's hard to learn, but you can learn too, try hard!
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Make your statement, whatever you want to explain! What are you shouting!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - There is no need to shout, it is not called "donation". So you gave other things!
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Mr. Veli can also learn, there is no problem, as long as he makes an effort!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Why was this tense?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Such things do not suit a teacher.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please friends, we are nearing the end of the speech.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Many incentive and support practices have been implemented to increase our women's participation in employment and their share in employment. The number of female insured people benefiting from the incentive of Law No. 6111 from 2011 to 2024, as of the 8th month, is 4 million 853 thousand 820 people. As a result of the successful policies implemented, the number of 4/A women insured, which was 2 million 28 thousand 192 in 2008, reached 5 million 605 thousand 398 as of August 2024.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - The minister is looking at you badly. "I couldn't explain it, but Resul explains it?" he says.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Ağbaba, please.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - He looks at you evilly, "Can't I explain the budget of the Ministry of Labor?" he says.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Labor force participation rate is 71.2 percent for men; It was calculated as 36 percent for women.

Women are also provided with the opportunity to continue their social security with optional insurance and to retire by paying their optional insurance premiums.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Everything is very nice (!) It seems there is nothing missing (!)
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Fighting against unregistered employment is one of the main priorities of the Ministry of Labor and Social Security and the Social Security Institution.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Go out to the streets and listen to the citizens! Politics does not happen by sitting in your office here.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Unregistered employment is being combated with effective inspection programs. As of October 2024, 100,500 workplaces and 775,500 employees have been inspected. As a result of the audit, 397 unregistered workplaces and 17,284 unregistered employees were identified. Currently, intensive inspections are continuing by both Ministry labor inspectors, SSI inspectors and SSI inspectors. Since it is not possible to carry out the struggle in this field only through inspection, emphasis has recently been placed on information, awareness-raising and awareness-raising activities within the scope of guidance. The unregistered employment rate, which was 52.1 percent in 2002, was reduced to 26 percent by 2024 with the measures and precautions taken. According to the second quarter data of 2024, the unregistered employment rate is 23.04 percent; percent in women.

CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Here you go, Kurt.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Regarding the inspections carried out in the last five years, administrative fines are imposed and unregistered insured people and workplaces are recorded.
Mr. President, dear members of parliament; We are a country that covers almost all of its citizens under the umbrella of general health insurance. With this awareness, we continue to provide many services in the field of health and ensure that our citizens have equal access to health services. Our Ministry of Labor and Social Security and SSI, which have reached a point that many countries take as an example in terms of health insurance, have been working with great devotion both during the epidemic period and during the earthquake period.

SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Are you explaining the Minister's job to the Minister?
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Brother, if you listen, you will understand and learn!
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - He explains it to you but you resist not understanding it.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Resul, please greet me.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Mr. President.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Resul, please let's finish.
OKAN KONURALP (Ankara) - Dear Minister, a great shame is being done to you here!
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - It tells about the things we have done in twenty-two years!
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Currently in 81 provinces.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Mr. President, can I get an extension of time?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - I gave additional time, please. I gave additional time again.
Please, let's finish it.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - A total of 631 million payments were made to 160,098 people from 2005, when the first payment was made within the scope of the Wage Guarantee Fund, until September 2024.

Currently, with the "Job Clubs Project" in 101 units in 81 provinces, work and employment activities are continuing for our citizens who require special policies for disadvantaged groups; women, disabled people, young people, Romani citizens, long-term unemployed people and substance addicts.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Kurt, please let's finish; Your time has expired, I extended it twice.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Finally, a lot of support has been provided to the earthquake region, and extending this support is important for the region. In this context, I request the support of our esteemed Minister and respectfully greet our esteemed audience.

fields.Subject: 2025 Yılı Merkezi Yönetim Bütçe Kanunu Teklifi (1/278) ve 2023 Yılı Merkezi Yönetim Kesin Hesap Kanunu Teklifi (1/277) ile Sayıştay tezkereleri münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
ESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Deprem bölgesinde Çalışma ve Sosyal Güvenlik Bakanlığı olarak birtakım tedbirler aldınız, bu tedbirler işe yaradı mı? Adıyaman'da ve deprem olan diğer illerinde deprem öncesi ve deprem sonrası çalışan sayılarını kıyasladığımızda nasıl bir durum ortaya çıkıyor?
Bir diğer sorum: Kayıt dışı istihdamla mücadele büyük önem taşıyor, bu konuda hangi çalışmalar yapılıyor?
Son sorum: Engelli istihdamını desteklemek için Çalışma ve Sosyal Güvenlik Bakanlığı hangi projeleri yürütüyor? Bu projelerle ne kadar engelli vatandaşımıza istihdam sağlanmıştır?
Teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
ESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - As the Ministry of Labor and Social Security, you took some measures in the earthquake region, did these measures work? What kind of situation emerges when we compare the number of employees before and after the earthquake in Adıyaman and other earthquake-affected provinces?
Another question I have: Combating unregistered employment is of great importance. What work is being done on this issue?
My last question: What projects does the Ministry of Labor and Social Security carry out to support the employment of disabled people? How many disabled citizens have been employed by these projects?
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish: RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Bakanım, öncelikle, seçim bölgem, memleketim Adıyaman'da eğitim kurumlarının ayağa kaldırılması ve evlatlarımızın eğitim kurumlarına kavuşması, Adıyaman Öğretmenevinin tamamlanması için verdikleri desteklerden dolayı şahsınıza ve bürokrat arkadaşlarımıza teşekkür ediyorum. Adıyaman Üniversitesinin ayağa kaldırılması ve gerek yerleşim yeri ve gerekse de öğretim üyesi eksiklerinin tamamlanması için YÖK Başkanlığımız tarafından ne gibi destekler planlanmaktadır? Yine, ülkemizin en önemli sorunu olan mesleki eğitim kurumlarına büyük bir ihtiyaç duyuluyor. Özellikle, sanayi ve hizmetler sektöründe ara eleman sorunun çözümü için mesleki eğitimle ilgili ne gibi çalışmalar yapılıyor? En fazla bilişim, yazılım alanında ihtiyaç olduğu gözlemleniyor. Eğitimlerin teşvik edilmesi için hangi çalışmalar yapılıyor?
records.englishTranslation: RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Dear Minister, first of all, I would like to thank you and our bureaucrat friends for their support for the establishment of educational institutions in my constituency, my hometown, Adıyaman, for our children to have access to educational institutions, and for the completion of Adıyaman Teachers' Center. What kind of support is planned by our Presidency of YÖK to revive Adıyaman University and fill the shortage of both settlement and faculty members? Again, there is a great need for vocational education institutions, which is the most important problem of our country. What kind of work is being done regarding vocational training to solve the intermediate staff problem, especially in the industry and services sectors? It is observed that the greatest need is in the field of informatics and software. What efforts are being made to promote training?

records.originalTurkish:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Bakanım, depremden etkilenen şehirlerle ilgili olarak mücbir sebepte bir uzatma düşünüyor musunuz? Yine, 3 trilyon vergiden vazgeçildiğiyle ilgili gündüz birtakım söylemler oldu; bu, doğru mudur? Türkiye'nin devlet borcu konusunda da farklı söylemler var. Gayrisafi millî hasılaya oranla devlet borcunun oranı nasıldır? Diğer ülkelerle kıyasladığınız zaman -Amerika Birleşik Devletleri olabilir, Avrupa ülkeleri olabilir- ne durumdayız?
Teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Dear Minister, are you considering an extension due to force majeure regarding the cities affected by the earthquake? Again, there were some statements during the day about waiving 3 trillion taxes; Is this true? There are also different discourses about Türkiye's public debt. What is the ratio of government debt to gross national product? How are we doing compared to other countries - it could be the United States, it could be European countries?
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Teşekkür ederim Sayın Başkanım.
Değerli milletvekilleri, Sayın Bakanım, çok kıymetli bürokratlar, değerli basın mensupları; herkesi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Bakanlığımız, enerji ve ülkemizin ekonomik ve sürdürülebilir kalkınması için kritik önem taşıyan birçok alanda halkımızın hizmetlerini karşılamaktadır. Türkiye'nin enerji politikaları, yatırımları, ülkemizin ekonomik kalkınması, enerji güvenliği ve sürdürülebilir kalkınma hedefleri açısından büyük önem taşıyor. Türkiye, enerji politikalarını güvenlik, sürdürülebilirlik ve rekabetçilik prensipleri üzerine inşa etmektedir. Yerli ve millî imkânlarla hareket ederek daha hızlı ve daha elverişli başarılara ulaşmaya devam edeceğiz.
Türkiye enerji talebi hızla artan bir ülke. Sanayileşme, şehirleşme, nüfus artışı enerji ihtiyacımızı her yıl daha da yükseltiyor. Enerji politikalarımız; enerji arz güvenliğini sağlamak, enerji maliyetlerini düşürmek, yenilenebilir ve yerli enerji kaynaklarının kullanımını artırmak olmak üzere üç temel hedef üzerine inşa edilmiştir. Enerji arz güvenliği için Türkiye enerji kaynaklarını çeşitlendirmeye büyük önem veriyor. Doğal gazda dışa bağımlılığı azaltmak amacıyla Karadeniz'de çok büyük, çok değerli projeler devam ediyor. Sayın Bakanımıza, ekibine hakikaten özverili çalışmalarından dolayı teşekkür ediyoruz.
Bir yandan doğal gaz aramalarımız devam ederken diğer yandan LNG terminalleri, depolama tesisleri inşa ediliyor. Bugün Silivri'deki doğal gaz depolaması ülkemize büyük bir güvence sağlamaktadır. Doğal gaz kesintilerinde ülkemizin ihtiyacını büyük ölçüde karşılayacak tesislere sahibiz.
Son yıllarda, Türkiye, güneş ve rüzgâr enerjisi gibi yenilenebilir kaynaklara büyük yatırımlar yapmıştır. Güneş, rüzgâr, hidroelektrik ve jeotermal enerji kaynakları bakımından ülkemiz büyük bir potansiyele sahiptir. Rüzgâr enerjisi alanında Türkiye, Avrupa'nın önde gelen ülkeleri arasında yer almaktadır. Rüzgâr enerjisinden elde edilen elektrik toplam üretimin yüzde 10'una yaklaşmıştır. Güneş enerjisinde ise özellikle güney ve İç Anadolu bölgelerimiz büyük bir potansiyel taşıyor, lisanslı ve lisanssız güneş enerjisi yatırımları hızla artıyor. Hidroelektrik enerjisi ülkemizin yenilenebilir enerji kaynakları içerisindeki en büyük payı oluşturuyor. Atatürk, Keban ve Ilısu gibi barajlar bir yandan enerji üretimine destek olurken öte yandan tarımsal sulamada önemli roller üstleniyor.
Elektrik üretiminde özel sektör yatırımlarının desteklenmesiyle bugün 114.600 megavat kurulu gücümüz olup bu kurulu gücün yaklaşık yüzde 60'ı yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklıdır ve sürekli olarak yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarındaki yatırımlar artmaktadır. Enerji sektörü Türkiye'nin enerji politikalarının merkezinde yer alıyor. Elektrik talebinin artışı
yeni yatırımları zorunlu kılıyor. Türkiye, elektrik iletim ve dağıtım altyapısını güçlendirmek için de birçok önemli projeye imza atıyor. Özellikle, yerli ve yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarının elektrik şebekesiyle entegrasyonu büyük bir önem taşıyor.
Enerji çeşitliliğini artırmak için bir yandan da nükleer enerji çalışmaları, yatırımları devam ediyor. Böylece hem enerji arz güvenliği sağlanacak hem de karbon emisyonlarını azaltma hedefine katkı sağlanacaktır.
"Önce insan, sonra çevre, daha sonra katma değerli ve güvenli madencilik" vizyonuyla ülkemiz madenciliği, son derece önemli yatırımlarla ülkemizin zengin yer altı kaynaklarının milletimizin hizmetine sunulmasında büyük bir görev ifa ediyor. Yer altı kaynaklarının dışa bağımlılığı azaltmak için ekonomiye kazandırılması son derece önemlidir. Şırnak'ta terör varken terörle anılan Şırnak, bugün -Sayın Bakanım, sizin ve ekibinizin gayretli çalışmalarıyla- petrol üretimi bakımından ülkemizin ihtiyacının karşılanmasında büyük bir önem taşıyor. İnşallah, çok kısa bir zaman içerisinde, Şırnak başta olmak üzere, petrol ihtiyacımızın karşılanmasında büyük bir atılım sağlanır. Bor, linyit, çeşitli madenler ve metaller Türkiye'nin enerji üretiminde önemli rol oynuyor.
Tabii, bu sözlerimin içerisinde... Özellikle seçim bölgem, memleketim Adıyaman'a büyük destekleriniz oldu hem deprem sürecinde hem depremden sonra elinizi çekmediniz; Adıyaman'a yaptığınız hizmetler, destekler için teşekkür ediyoruz. 6 Şubat depremlerinde Adıyaman büyük hasar aldı. Memleketim Adıyaman'da hem TPAO hem de TPIC tarafından, Bakanlığınıza bağlı birimler tarafından çok önemli yatırımlar hemşehrilerimizin hizmetine sunuldu. Bakanlığın bu birimleri tarafından bölgede, özellikle konteyner başta olmak üzere, çadır kentler başta olmak üzere çok güzel hizmetler oldu. Bir yandan da Bakanlığınızın misafirhanelerinde ve tesislerinde de çok sayıda hemşehrimiz uzun süre sağlıklı bir ortamda, güvenli bir şekilde sizlerin misafiri oldu. Bunun için de teşekkür ediyoruz.
6 Şubat asrın felaketinden sonra özellikle Adıyaman'da TPAO'nun konteyner kentinde kalmak, gerçekten orada yaşayan hemşehrilerimiz için çok arzu edilen, çok talep gören bir durum. Bunun için özellikle hassaten teşekkür ediyoruz.
Yine, 6 Şubat asrın felaketinden sonra bölgemizde hasar gören konutlar ve iş yerlerinde, acil olarak yıkılması gereken binalarda elektrik ve doğal gaz abonelerinin 6 Şubat 2023 tarihine kadar tahakkuk etmiş ancak 6 Şubat 2023 tarihine kadar olan ödenmemiş fatura bedelleri, bunların ilave masrafları sizin gayretlerinize terkin edildi. Bunun için de ayrıca teşekkür ediyoruz.
2024 yılı Eylül ayına kadar 832 bin aileye 755.928 ton kömür yardımı yapıldı. 2023-2024 eğitim öğretim döneminde yine, Millî Eğitim Bakanlığının talebiyle 380 bin ton kömür talebi iletilmiş olup bunların da sevkiyatları gerçekleşmiştir. 2024 Şubat ayı tarihi itibarıyla 375.176 ton kömür sevkiyatının gerçekleştirilmiş olmasından mutluluk duyuyoruz. Yine, imzalanan protokolle de 193.027 ton kömür okullara eylül ayına kadar teslim edilmiş.
Sürdürülebilir madencilik uygulamaları, çevreye zarar vermeden kaynakların etkin bir şekilde kullanılmasını sağlayabilir. Bu bağlamda, çevresel denetimlerin artırılması ve rehabilitasyon projelerinin hayata geçirilmesi de büyük önem taşıyor.
Sayın Bakanım, ihtiyaç sahibi hanelere elektrik tüketim desteği de verilmektedir. Bu kapsamda, 795 sayılı Cumhurbaşkanı Kararı kapsamında hanedeki kişi sayısı kriteri dikkate alınarak aylık 150 kilovatsaat karşılığı tutara kadar Aile ve Sosyal Hizmetler Bakanlığı bütçesinden destekleme yapılıyor. Bu kapsamda, 2019-2023 yılı döneminde toplam 19,6 milyar TL tutarında
elektrik tüketim desteği verilmiş olup 2023 yılında yaklaşık 4,4 milyon haneye 8,7 milyar TL destek sağlanmıştır. 2024 yılı Ocak-Ağustos döneminde yaklaşık 4 milyon haneye 5,5 milyar TL tutarında destek sağlanmıştır. Türkiye, 2030-2050 hedefleri doğrultusunda enerji verimliliğini artırmayı ve bu anlamda, enerji alanında AR-GE faaliyetlerine daha fazla yatırım yaparak teknolojik yeniliklerin ülkemizde uygulanması noktasında önemli hedefler koymuştur.
Türkiye, enerji politikalarıyla yerli kaynaklara dayalı, sürdürülebilir, çevre dostu bir enerji altyapısı oluşturmayı hedefliyor. Madencilik sektöründeki yatırımlar ve yenilenebilir enerjiye yapılan teşvikler bu hedeflere ulaşmamızda önemli rol oynuyor ancak çevresel etkiler ve uluslararası iklim anlaşmalarına uyum gibi konularda daha dengeli politikalar geliştirilmesi gerekmektedir.
Vatandaşlarımıza verilen destekten ötürü Sayın Cumhurbaşkanımız başta olmak üzere Sayın Bakanımıza ve kıymetli bürokratlarına bir kez daha buradan teşekkür ediyor, sözlerime son verirken 2025 yılı Bakanlık bütçesinin hayırlı olmasını diliyor, hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
BAŞKAN ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Resul Kurt, teşekkür ederim.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear MPs, Dear Minister, very valuable bureaucrats, valuable members of the press; I greet everyone with respect.
Our Ministry provides services to our people in many areas that are critical for energy and the economic and sustainable development of our country. Türkiye's energy policies and investments are of great importance for our country's economic development, energy security and sustainable development goals. Türkiye builds its energy policies on the principles of security, sustainability and competitiveness. We will continue to achieve faster and more convenient success by acting with local and national resources.
Türkiye is a country with rapidly increasing energy demand. Industrialization, urbanization and population growth increase our energy needs every year. Our energy policies; It is built on three basic goals: ensuring energy supply security, reducing energy costs, and increasing the use of renewable and domestic energy resources. For energy supply security, Türkiye attaches great importance to diversifying its energy resources. Very large and valuable projects are continuing in the Black Sea in order to reduce foreign dependency on natural gas. We thank our esteemed Minister and his team for their truly devoted work.
While our natural gas exploration continues, LNG terminals and storage facilities are being built. Today, natural gas storage in Silivri provides great assurance to our country. We have facilities that will largely meet our country's needs in case of natural gas outages.
In recent years, Türkiye has made major investments in renewable resources such as solar and wind energy. Our country has a great potential in terms of solar, wind, hydroelectric and geothermal energy resources. Türkiye is among the leading countries in Europe in the field of wind energy. Electricity obtained from wind energy has approached 10 percent of total production. Our southern and Central Anatolia regions have a great potential in solar energy, and licensed and unlicensed solar energy investments are increasing rapidly. Hydroelectric energy constitutes the largest share in our country's renewable energy resources. While dams such as Atatürk, Keban and Ilısu support energy production, they also play important roles in agricultural irrigation.
With the support of private sector investments in electricity production, today we have an installed power of 114,600 megawatts, approximately 60 percent of this installed power comes from renewable energy, and investments in renewable energy sources are constantly increasing. The energy sector is at the center of Türkiye's energy policies. Increase in electricity demand
necessitates new investments. Türkiye is also undertaking many important projects to strengthen its electricity transmission and distribution infrastructure. In particular, the integration of domestic and renewable energy resources with the electricity grid is of great importance.
In order to increase energy diversity, nuclear energy studies and investments continue.

Thus, energy supply security will be ensured and it will contribute to the goal of reducing carbon emissions.
With the vision of "first people, then the environment, then value-added and safe mining", our country's mining plays a great role in making our country's rich underground resources available to our nation with extremely important investments. It is extremely important to bring underground resources into the economy in order to reduce foreign dependency. Şırnak, which was associated with terrorism when there was terrorism in Şırnak, is of great importance today - Mr. Minister, with the diligent work of you and your team - in meeting our country's needs in terms of oil production. Hopefully, in a very short time, a major breakthrough will be achieved in meeting our oil needs, especially in Şırnak. Boron, lignite, various mines and metals play an important role in Türkiye's energy production.
Of course, this is in my words. You provided great support especially to my constituency, my hometown, Adıyaman, both during and after the earthquake; We thank you for your services and support to Adıyaman. Adıyaman suffered great damage in the February 6 earthquakes. In my hometown, Adıyaman, very important investments were made available to our fellow citizens by both TPAO and TPIC, and by the units affiliated with your Ministry. These units of the Ministry provided very good services in the region, especially containers and tent cities. On the other hand, many of our citizens were your guests in a healthy and safe environment for a long time in the guesthouses and facilities of your Ministry. We thank you for this too.
After the disaster of February 6th, staying in TPAO's container city, especially in Adıyaman, is a very desirable and in-demand situation for our fellow citizens living there. We especially thank you for this.
Again, after the disaster of the 6th of February, the unpaid invoices of the electricity and natural gas subscribers in the damaged residences and workplaces in our region and the buildings that needed to be urgently demolished until 6 February 2023, as well as their additional expenses, have been abandoned to your efforts. We also thank you for this.
Until September 2024, 755,928 tons of coal aid was provided to 832 thousand families. In the 2023-2024 academic period, a request for 380 thousand tons of coal was submitted upon the request of the Ministry of National Education, and their shipments were made. We are happy that 375,176 tons of coal were shipped as of February 2024. Again, with the signed protocol, 193,027 tons of coal were delivered to schools by September.
Sustainable mining practices can ensure efficient use of resources without harming the environment. In this context, increasing environmental inspections and implementing rehabilitation projects are also of great importance.
Dear Minister, electricity consumption support is also provided to households in need.

In this context, within the scope of Presidential Decree No. 795, support is provided from the budget of the Ministry of Family and Social Services up to a monthly amount of 150 kilowatt-hours, taking into account the criterion of the number of people in the household. In this context, a total of 19.6 billion TL in the 2019-2023 period.
Electricity consumption support was provided and 8.7 billion TL support was provided to approximately 4.4 million households in 2023. In the January-August period of 2024, support worth 5.5 billion TL was provided to approximately 4 million households. Turkey has set important targets to increase energy efficiency in line with the 2030-2050 targets and to implement technological innovations in our country by investing more in R&D activities in the field of energy.
Türkiye aims to create a sustainable, environmentally friendly energy infrastructure based on domestic resources with its energy policies. Investments in the mining sector and incentives for renewable energy play an important role in achieving these goals, but more balanced policies need to be developed on issues such as environmental impacts and compliance with international climate agreements.
I would like to thank our President, our Minister and his valuable bureaucrats once again for the support given to our citizens. As I conclude my words, I wish the Ministry's budget for 2025 to be beneficial, and I respectfully greet you all.
CHAIRMAN ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Resul Kurt, thank you.

Bu kapsamda, 795 sayılı Cumhurbaşkanı Kararı kapsamında hanedeki kişi sayısı kriteri dikkate alınarak aylık 150 kilovatsaat karşılığı tutara kadar Aile ve Sosyal Hizmetler Bakanlığı bütçesinden destekleme yapılıyor. Bu kapsamda, 2019-2023 yılı döneminde toplam 19,6 milyar TL tutarında
elektrik tüketim desteği verilmiş olup 2023 yılında yaklaşık 4,4 milyon haneye 8,7 milyar TL destek sağlanmıştır. 2024 yılı Ocak-Ağustos döneminde yaklaşık 4 milyon haneye 5,5 milyar TL tutarında destek sağlanmıştır. Türkiye, 2030-2050 hedefleri doğrultusunda enerji verimliliğini artırmayı ve bu anlamda, enerji alanında AR-GE faaliyetlerine daha fazla yatırım yaparak teknolojik yeniliklerin ülkemizde uygulanması noktasında önemli hedefler koymuştur.
Türkiye, enerji politikalarıyla yerli kaynaklara dayalı, sürdürülebilir, çevre dostu bir enerji altyapısı oluşturmayı hedefliyor. Madencilik sektöründeki yatırımlar ve yenilenebilir enerjiye yapılan teşvikler bu hedeflere ulaşmamızda önemli rol oynuyor ancak çevresel etkiler ve uluslararası iklim anlaşmalarına uyum gibi konularda daha dengeli politikalar geliştirilmesi gerekmektedir.
Vatandaşlarımıza verilen destekten ötürü Sayın Cumhurbaşkanımız başta olmak üzere Sayın Bakanımıza ve kıymetli bürokratlarına bir kez daha buradan teşekkür ediyor, sözlerime son verirken 2025 yılı Bakanlık bütçesinin hayırlı olmasını diliyor, hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
BAŞKAN ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Resul Kurt, teşekkür ederim.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear MPs, Dear Minister, very valuable bureaucrats, valuable members of the press; I greet everyone with respect.
Our Ministry provides services to our people in many areas that are critical for energy and the economic and sustainable development of our country. Türkiye's energy policies and investments are of great importance for our country's economic development, energy security and sustainable development goals. Türkiye builds its energy policies on the principles of security, sustainability and competitiveness. We will continue to achieve faster and more convenient success by acting with local and national resources.
Türkiye is a country with rapidly increasing energy demand. Industrialization, urbanization and population growth increase our energy needs every year. Our energy policies; It is built on three basic goals: ensuring energy supply security, reducing energy costs, and increasing the use of renewable and domestic energy resources. For energy supply security, Türkiye attaches great importance to diversifying its energy resources. Very large and valuable projects are continuing in the Black Sea in order to reduce foreign dependency on natural gas. We thank our esteemed Minister and his team for their truly devoted work.
While our natural gas exploration continues, LNG terminals and storage facilities are being built. Today, natural gas storage in Silivri provides great assurance to our country. We have facilities that will largely meet our country's needs in case of natural gas outages.
In recent years, Türkiye has made major investments in renewable resources such as solar and wind energy. Our country has a great potential in terms of solar, wind, hydroelectric and geothermal energy resources. Türkiye is among the leading countries in Europe in the field of wind energy. Electricity obtained from wind energy has approached 10 percent of total production. Our southern and Central Anatolia regions have a great potential in solar energy, and licensed and unlicensed solar energy investments are increasing rapidly. Hydroelectric energy constitutes the largest share in our country's renewable energy resources. While dams such as Atatürk, Keban and Ilısu support energy production, they also play important roles in agricultural irrigation.
With the support of private sector investments in electricity production, today we have an installed power of 114,600 megawatts, approximately 60 percent of this installed power comes from renewable energy, and investments in renewable energy sources are constantly increasing. The energy sector is at the center of Türkiye's energy policies. Increase in electricity demand
necessitates new investments. Türkiye is also undertaking many important projects to strengthen its electricity transmission and distribution infrastructure. In particular, the integration of domestic and renewable energy resources with the electricity grid is of great importance.
In order to increase energy diversity, nuclear energy studies and investments continue.

Thus, energy supply security will be ensured and it will contribute to the goal of reducing carbon emissions.
With the vision of "first people, then the environment, then value-added and safe mining", our country's mining plays a great role in making our country's rich underground resources available to our nation with extremely important investments. It is extremely important to bring underground resources into the economy in order to reduce foreign dependency. Şırnak, which was associated with terrorism when there was terrorism in Şırnak, is of great importance today - Mr. Minister, with the diligent work of you and your team - in meeting our country's needs in terms of oil production. Hopefully, in a very short time, a major breakthrough will be achieved in meeting our oil needs, especially in Şırnak. Boron, lignite, various mines and metals play an important role in Türkiye's energy production.
Of course, this is in my words. You provided great support especially to my constituency, my hometown, Adıyaman, both during and after the earthquake; We thank you for your services and support to Adıyaman. Adıyaman suffered great damage in the February 6 earthquakes. In my hometown, Adıyaman, very important investments were made available to our fellow citizens by both TPAO and TPIC, and by the units affiliated with your Ministry. These units of the Ministry provided very good services in the region, especially containers and tent cities. On the other hand, many of our citizens were your guests in a healthy and safe environment for a long time in the guesthouses and facilities of your Ministry. We thank you for this too.
After the disaster of February 6th, staying in TPAO's container city, especially in Adıyaman, is a very desirable and in-demand situation for our fellow citizens living there. We especially thank you for this.
Again, after the disaster of the 6th of February, the unpaid invoices of the electricity and natural gas subscribers in the damaged residences and workplaces in our region and the buildings that needed to be urgently demolished until 6 February 2023, as well as their additional expenses, have been abandoned to your efforts. We also thank you for this.
Until September 2024, 755,928 tons of coal aid was provided to 832 thousand families. In the 2023-2024 academic period, a request for 380 thousand tons of coal was submitted upon the request of the Ministry of National Education, and their shipments were made. We are happy that 375,176 tons of coal were shipped as of February 2024. Again, with the signed protocol, 193,027 tons of coal were delivered to schools by September.
Sustainable mining practices can ensure efficient use of resources without harming the environment. In this context, increasing environmental inspections and implementing rehabilitation projects are also of great importance.
Dear Minister, electricity consumption support is also provided to households in need.

In this context, within the scope of Presidential Decree No. 795, support is provided from the budget of the Ministry of Family and Social Services up to a monthly amount of 150 kilowatt-hours, taking into account the criterion of the number of people in the household. In this context, a total of 19.6 billion TL in the 2019-2023 period.
Electricity consumption support was provided and 8.7 billion TL support was provided to approximately 4.4 million households in 2023. In the January-August period of 2024, support worth 5.5 billion TL was provided to approximately 4 million households. Turkey has set important targets to increase energy efficiency in line with the 2030-2050 targets and to implement technological innovations in our country by investing more in R&D activities in the field of energy.
Türkiye aims to create a sustainable, environmentally friendly energy infrastructure based on domestic resources with its energy policies. Investments in the mining sector and incentives for renewable energy play an important role in achieving these goals, but more balanced policies need to be developed on issues such as environmental impacts and compliance with international climate agreements.
I would like to thank our President, our Minister and his valuable bureaucrats once again for the support given to our citizens. As I conclude my words, I wish the Ministry's budget for 2025 to be beneficial, and I respectfully greet you all.
CHAIRMAN ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Resul Kurt, thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Teşekkür ediyorum Sayın Başkanım.
Sayın Başkanım, çok kıymetli Plan ve Bütçe Komisyonumuzun değerli üyeleri, Sayın Bakanım, çok değerli bürokratlarımız, kıymetli basın mensupları; hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Öncelikle, Gazi Meclisimizde hiçbir milletvekilinin arzu etmediği Meclisin demokratik işleyişine karşı yapılan bu davranışı tasvip etmek ve kabul etmek mümkün değildir. Sayın Ali Mahir Başarır'ın İçişleri Bakanımız için "Milletvekillerini belediyeye sokmuyorsan o zaman Meclise gelmeyeceksin." diyerek işaret fişeğini 11 Kasım tarihinde attığı bu eylem yanlıştır, demokratik siyasete yakışmamıştır.
İçişleri Bakanlığı; il ve ilçelerin yönetimi, mülki idare, güvenlik, emniyet, göç yönetimi, afet ve acil durumların yönetimi, nüfus ve vatandaşlık hizmetleri gibi son derece kritik ve önemli görevleri ifa etmektedir. Tüm bu hizmetlerin yerine getirilmesi için de 1 trilyon 93 milyar 985 milyon bütçe öngörülmektedir. Sayın Bakanımız açıkladı; FETÖ'ye, DEAŞ'a, sol terör örgütlerine 1.500, belki 2.000'e yakın operasyon yapıldı. 4.177 FETÖ'ye, DEAŞ'a 1.025, sol örgütlere 545, yine bazı terör örgütlerine 192 operasyon yapıldı. Bu operasyonların kamuoyuna yansımayan ama arkasında kahramanlık hikâyelerinin yattığını; 72 bombalı eylem hazırlığının, 92 terör eyleminin kaynağında etkisiz hâle getirilerek engellendiğini... İçişleri Bakanlığımızın kararlı çalışmaları, güvenlik güçlerimizin fedakârlığı, Cumhurbaşkanımızın liderliği bu başarının anahtarıdır. İç güvenlik hizmetleri bu kapsamda 620.339 emniyet, jandarma, sahil güvenlik ve güvenlik korucusuyla 11.611 araçla yerine getiriliyor. Burada kahraman güvenlik personelimize aziz milletimiz adına şükranlarımı sunuyorum. Kahraman polisimiz, jandarmamız, sahil güvenliğimiz, güvenlik korucularımızın ayağına taş değmesin diyorum.
Düzenli ve düzensiz göçte transit ve hedef ülke olan Türkiye, bir yandan da insan ticaretine karşı mücadele vermektedir. Dünyada milyonlarca insan çatışmalar, ekonomik zorluklar, çevresel faktörler ve daha iyi bir yaşam arayışı nedeniyle ülkelerini terk etmek zorunda kalıyor. Düzensiz göç yalnız göçmenleri değil geçiş ve hedef ülkeleri de derinden etkileyen küresel
bir sorun hâline gelmiştir. Türkiye, Asya, Avrupa ve Orta Doğu’nun kesişim noktasında yer alması nedeniyle düzensiz göçte kilit bir geçiş noktasıdır. Özellikle Suriye'deki iç savaş, Afganistan'daki çatışmalar ve Orta Doğu'daki istikrarsızlık milyonlarca insanın sığındığı veya Avrupa'ya geçiş için kullandığı bir ülke olarak Türkiye'yi hedef ülke hâline getirmiştir. Bugün ülkemiz 4 milyonu aşkın sığınmacı ve mülteciye ev sahipliği yapmaktadır. Düzensiz göçle mücadelede ülkemiz hem insani hem de güvenlik odaklı politikalar izlemektedir. Türkiye, sınır güvenliğini artırmak için teknolojik altyapı yatırımları yapmış, sınır duvarları ve izleme sistemleri kurmuştur. Sahil güvenlik ekipleri Ege ve Akdeniz üzerinden yapılan geçişleri engellemek için yoğun bir çaba harcamaktadır. Göç yönetimi ciddi bir maddi ve insani kaynak gerektirmektedir. Türkiye, Avrupa Birliğiyle imzalanan geri kabul anlaşması gibi mekanizmalarla göçün kontrolü için ortak adımlar atmaktadır. Yük paylaşımı ve finansal destek konularında uluslararası toplum, yükümlülüklerini de yeterince yerine getirmemektedir.
Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; Türkiye, sığınmacıların temel ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için geçici barınma merkezleri, sağlık hizmetleri ve eğitim imkânları sağlamaktadır.
İçişleri Bakanlığımızın önemli görevlerinden biri de deprem, sel, su baskını, yangın gibi doğal afetlerde ortaya çıkmaktadır. Depremler yalnızca fiziksel yıkıma neden olmakla kalmaz, aynı zamanda toplumu her yönüyle derinden etkiler. Depremler, can kaybı, yaralanma ve ekonomik etkilerinin yanı sıra aileler ve toplum için de büyük bir travmaya sebebiyet verir.
Seçim bölgem, memleketim Adıyaman da -6 Şubat bin yılın felaketinden büyük şekilde yaralanan şehrim- çok sayıda konut ve iş yeri yıkılması, binlerce hemşehrimizin hayatını kaybetmesi, yaralanması, evsiz kalması nedeniyle depremden yoğun şekilde etkilenmiştir. Deprem mağdurlarında stres, kaygı ve travma sonrası stres bozukluğu gibi sorunlar yaygın şekilde karşımıza çıkmaktadır. Bu durum, bireylerin sosyal hayata ve çalışma yaşamına geri dönmelerini zorlaştırmaktadır. Bu anlamda başta şehrim Adıyaman olmak üzere depremden yoğun etkilenen bölgelerde bu tür bir sosyal desteğe büyük bir ihtiyaç olduğunu belirtmek istiyorum. Depremin etkilediği bölgelerde insanlar güvenli yerlere göç eder, bu da hem göç edilen bölgelerde hem de terk edilen alanlarda toplumsal dengenin bozulmasına neden olur.
Seçim bölgem, memleketim Adıyaman depremde en çok zarar gören 4 ilimizden biridir. 5.953 bina yıkılmış, 19.050 bina ağır hasarlı hâle gelmiş -binalardan dolayı yaşanan yıkımlarda- hayatını kaybeden 8.387 vatandaşımız olmuş, 17.499 vatandaşımız da -binalardan çeşitli nedenlerle yıkımdan sonra- yaralanmıştır.
Adıyaman'da hâlihazırda depremden sonra yaşanan yoğun inşaatlarda büyük bir ilerleme sağlanmış, 17.713 konut hak sahiplerine teslim edilmiş, yaşam başlamış, 2024 yılı sonu itibarıyla da 22-23 bin konut ve iş yerinin hak sahiplerine teslimi gerçekleşmiş olacaktır. 2024 yıl sonuna kadar tüm deprem bölgesinde yaklaşık 200 binin üzerinde bağımsız bölümün hak sahiplerine teslimine çalışılmakta, bu yönde planlamalar yapılmaktadır.
6 Şubat depremleri neticesinde ekonomi kısa ve uzun vadede önemli ölçüde etkilenmiştir. Küçük ve orta ölçekli işletmelerin yıkılması ekonomik faaliyetlerde duraksamaya yol açmış, esnaflarımızın yıkılan iş yerlerinden dolayı ekonomik ve mali kayıpları ortaya çıkmıştır. Konutlar, iş yerleri, okullar, binalar, yollar, köprüler, enerji hatları gibi altyapı ciddi şekilde hasar görmüş, ticaret ve üretim faaliyetleri durma noktasına gelmiştir. Yeniden yapılanma ve yardım faaliyetleriyle vatandaşlarımızın talepleri hızla karşılanmış ve karşılanmaya devam edilmektedir. Binalar, tesisler, altyapı tamamlansa da vatandaşlarımızın yaşadığı travmanın etkileri devam etmektedir.
Deprem gibi doğal afetlerde AFAD'ın faaliyetleri ve bu afetlerin topluma olan
sosyal ve ekonomik etkileri oldukça önemlidir.
Bu nedenle, başta şehrim Adıyaman olmak üzere deprem bölgesinden elini çekmeyen Sayın Cumhurbaşkanımıza, şehrimizin her sorunu için canla başla çözüm arayan Sayın Bakanımıza, bürokratlarımıza çok teşekkür ediyorum. Sayın Bakanımıza her ne sorunu götürdüysek Sayın Bakanımız şehrimizin ihtiyaçları konusunda elinden gelen bütün gayreti göstermiştir; şükranlarımı sunuyorum. Aylarca evine gitmeyen, depremzede hemşehrilerimize sahip çıkan mülki idare amirlerine, Emniyet, Jandarma, AFAD personeli başta olmak üzere İçişleri personeline de yine aynı şükranımı arz ediyorum.
Sözlerime son verirken Bakanlık bütçesinin hayırlı olmasını diliyor, hazırunu saygıyla selamlıyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Mr. President, esteemed members of our esteemed Planning and Budget Commission, esteemed Minister, our esteemed bureaucrats, esteemed members of the press; I greet you all with respect.
First of all, it is not possible to approve and accept this behavior against the democratic functioning of the Parliament, which is not desired by any MP in our Veteran Parliament. Mr. Ali Mahir Basarir said about our Minister of Internal Affairs, "If you do not let the MPs into the municipality, then you will not come to the Parliament." This action, in which he fired the flare on November 11, was wrong and did not suit democratic politics.
Ministry of the Interior; It performs extremely critical and important duties such as the management of provinces and districts, civil administration, security, safety, migration management, disaster and emergency management, population and citizenship services. A budget of 1 trillion 93 billion 985 million is envisaged for the fulfillment of all these services. Our esteemed Minister explained; Nearly 1,500, perhaps 2,000 operations were carried out against FETO, DAESH and left-wing terrorist organizations. 4,177 operations were carried out against FETO, 1,025 against DAESH, 545 against left-wing organizations, and 192 against some terrorist organizations. He stated that there are stories of heroism behind these operations, which are not reflected in the public view; 72 bomb attack preparations and 92 terrorist attacks were prevented by neutralizing them at their source. The determined work of our Ministry of Internal Affairs, the sacrifices of our security forces and the leadership of our President are the keys to this success. In this context, internal security services are provided by 620,339 police, gendarmerie, coast guard and security guards and 11,611 vehicles. Here, I would like to express my gratitude to our heroic security personnel on behalf of our beloved nation. I say that our heroic police, gendarmerie, coast guard and security guards should not be left unturned.
Türkiye, which is a transit and destination country for regular and irregular migration, also fights against human trafficking. Millions of people around the world are forced to leave their countries due to conflicts, economic difficulties, environmental factors and the search for a better life. Irregular migration is a global problem that deeply affects not only immigrants but also transit and destination countries.
has become a problem. Türkiye is a key transit point for irregular migration as it is located at the intersection of Asia, Europe and the Middle East. In particular, the civil war in Syria, conflicts in Afghanistan and instability in the Middle East have made Türkiye a target country as a country where millions of people take shelter or use to pass to Europe. Today, our country hosts more than 4 million asylum seekers and refugees. Our country follows both humanitarian and security-oriented policies in the fight against irregular migration. Türkiye has invested in technological infrastructure and established border walls and monitoring systems to increase border security. Coast guard teams are making intense efforts to prevent passage through the Aegean and Mediterranean. Migration management requires serious material and human resources. Türkiye is taking joint steps to control migration through mechanisms such as the readmission agreement signed with the European Union.

The international community does not adequately fulfill its obligations regarding burden sharing and financial support.
Mr. President, dear MPs; Türkiye provides temporary shelter centers, health services and education opportunities to meet the basic needs of refugees.
One of the important duties of our Ministry of Internal Affairs occurs in natural disasters such as earthquakes, floods, floods and fires. Earthquakes not only cause physical destruction, but also profoundly affect every aspect of society. Earthquakes cause great trauma for families and society, as well as loss of life, injury and economic effects.
My constituency, my hometown, Adıyaman - my city, which was greatly injured by the February 6 millennium disaster - was heavily affected by the earthquake due to the collapse of many residences and workplaces, and the loss of life, injury and homelessness of thousands of our fellow citizens. Problems such as stress, anxiety and post-traumatic stress disorder are common in earthquake victims. This situation makes it difficult for individuals to return to social and working life. In this sense, I would like to state that there is a great need for this type of social support in the regions heavily affected by the earthquake, especially my city Adıyaman. In areas affected by earthquakes, people migrate to safe places, which causes social balance to deteriorate both in the migrated areas and in the abandoned areas.
My constituency, my hometown Adıyaman, is one of the 4 provinces most damaged by the earthquake. 5,953 buildings were destroyed, 19,050 buildings were severely damaged, 8,387 citizens lost their lives - due to the demolition of buildings - and 17,499 citizens were injured - after the buildings were destroyed for various reasons.
A great progress has been made in the intensive constructions that took place in Adıyaman after the earthquake, 17,713 houses have been delivered to the rightful owners, life has started, and by the end of 2024, 22-23 thousand houses and workplaces will be delivered to the rightful owners. Efforts are being made to deliver approximately more than 200 thousand independent sections to the rightful owners in the entire earthquake region by the end of 2024, and plans are being made in this direction.
As a result of the February 6 earthquakes, the economy was significantly affected in the short and long term. The collapse of small and medium-sized businesses caused a halt in economic activities, and our tradesmen suffered economic and financial losses due to the destroyed workplaces. Infrastructure such as residences, workplaces, schools, buildings, roads, bridges and power lines were seriously damaged, and trade and production activities came to a halt. The demands of our citizens have been quickly met and continue to be met through restructuring and aid activities. Even though the buildings, facilities and infrastructure are completed, the effects of the trauma experienced by our citizens continue.
AFAD's activities in natural disasters such as earthquakes and the effects of these disasters on society
The social and economic effects are very important.

For this reason, I would like to thank our President, who did not leave the earthquake zone, especially my city Adıyaman, our Minister and our bureaucrats who are diligently seeking solutions to every problem of our city. Whatever problem we brought to our esteemed Minister, our esteemed Minister has made every effort to meet the needs of our city; I express my gratitude. I would like to express my gratitude to the civil administration chiefs, the Police, Gendarmerie, AFAD personnel and the Internal Affairs personnel, who took care of our earthquake-affected citizens who did not go home for months.
As I conclude my remarks, I wish the Ministry's budget to be beneficial and I respectfully greet those present.

records.originalTurkish:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Teşekkür ederim Sayın Başkanım.
Sayın Bakanım, devletimiz tüm gücüyle deprem bölgesinin yaralarını sarmaya devam ediyor. Bazı rakamların netleşmesi adına Adıyaman'da Valilik, kaymakamlık ve AFAD başta olmak üzere Bakanlık tarafından hangi çalışmalar yapıldı, neler yapılmaya devam ediyor? Tüm deprem bölgesinde toplam kaç vatandaşımız vefat etti, kaç yaralı var? Aranan ve bulunamayan vatandaşlarımız var; bunların sayısını bizimle paylaşır mısınız?
Teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear Minister, our state continues to heal the wounds of the earthquake region with all its might. What work has been done by the Ministry, especially the Governorship, District Governorate and AFAD in Adıyaman, in order to clarify some figures, and what continues to be done? How many of our citizens died and how many were injured in total in the entire earthquake region? We have citizens who are wanted and cannot be found; Could you share the number of them with us?
Thank you.
