SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Varsa yüreğin eleştir!
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Eleştiririm.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Dear President, esteemed members of the Planning and Budget Commission, Dear Minister, esteemed bureaucrats, esteemed members of the press, esteemed representatives of our non-governmental organizations; I respectfully greet all of you on behalf of our group regarding the budget of the Ministry of Labor and Social Security for 2026.
At the beginning of my words, I wish God's mercy to our workers who lost their lives in the fire in the perfume warehouse in Kocaeli Dilovası district, my condolences to their families and relatives, and I wish a speedy recovery to our injured.
The Ministry of Labor and Social Security is one of the important ministries that most closely concerns employees, employers, industrialists, retirees, in short, all segments of society. The mission it undertakes in terms of health, social security, retirement, economic stability and social welfare touches the lives of every citizen from birth to death. The modern social security system in Türkiye gained an institutional structure with the Workers' Insurance Institution established in 1946, and an important turning point was achieved with the establishment of the Social Security Institution with the comprehensive social security reform carried out in 2006. Thus, SSK, BAĞ-KUR and Emekli Sandığı were combined under a single institution, providing equal access to services. In particular, some regulations - as stated by our esteemed Member of Parliament Mustafa Kalaycı just now, which were really very painful in the past and disrupted the balance in the social security system - negatively affecting not only the economy, the Social Security Institution, but also retirees, employees and the actuarial structure of the institution - the constant manipulation of the retirement age - have disrupted the actuarial balance of the social security system and the Social Security Institution. Since 2002, AK PARTY governments have followed a determined policy with the aim of maintaining labor peace, increasing employment, reducing unemployment, and improving working life in strong cooperation with social stakeholders. The steps to be taken by the Ministry of Labor and Social Security in line with the Türkiye Century vision, together with the 2026 budget, will further strengthen justice, prosperity and stability in working life.
On this occasion, I would like to make some evaluations about my constituency and hometown Adıyaman and the earthquake region. Adıyaman, which was severely damaged in the earthquake, unfortunately one third of the city was destroyed, and is struggling hard to get back on its feet today.
The SSI Provincial Directorate building was also destroyed in the earthquake. With the efforts of our esteemed Minister - I would like to thank at this point - the foundations were laid for the commissioning of our Adıyaman SGK Provincial Directorate building and foundation excavations were started. We will be very happy that Adıyaman will have this SSI service building in a very short time - I hope.
Again, during the earthquake, the labor market in Adıyaman came to a halt. The number of insured people, which was 73,506 before the earthquake, dropped to 47 thousand immediately after the earthquake disaster. With the strong leadership of our President, the determined will of our state and the coordinated efforts of our Minister of Labor and Social Security, our businesses in Adıyaman are back on their feet.

Thanks to the employment incentives, İŞKUR's active programs and social security incentives, the number of compulsory insured people reached 96,950 as of July 2025.
Dear Minister, it is of great importance to extend the force majeure period and continue economic support in order to fully normalize social and economic life in the earthquake region. 4 provinces were affected by the earthquake the most. In order for the economic recovery to continue in this sense in Adıyaman, Hatay, Kahramanmaraş and Malatya, supports must continue to improve social and economic life. Various facilities were provided to everyone, especially our tradesmen, artisans, industrialists and traders. The force majeure situation has been extended until 30 November 2025. In every visit we make to our constituency, our tradesmen, especially our business people, have an important demand; Extension of the force majeure situation. Extending the force majeure situation for at least six months or one year will provide great convenience to business people, tradesmen and freelancers operating in the region. We need additional incentives and supports to strengthen the regional industrialists, prevent workforce loss and increase employment. In these 4 provinces, the recovery and recovery of the region will be possible with new investment incentives and low-interest loans so that our industrialists and employers can increase their investments, prevent labor migration, and expand employment. One issue in particular is important: There are many tradesmen and business people in our 4 provinces who could not do business during the earthquake. Since they could not continue any commercial activities, they could not pay their BAĞ-KUR premiums. Therefore, in order to open a white page, only for our 4 provinces - this is about the unpaid parts of BAĞ-KUR premium debts; Various legal regulations have been made several times before. It is important to make a regulation regarding the deletion of BAĞ-KUR debts and the ability of insured people to revive this at a later date if they wish. This does not bring a financial burden, that is, BAĞ-KUR premiums, which are not already paid and seem very difficult to pay, will no longer be a burden on the system, and the opportunity to revive them will be provided to small tradesmen who want to borrow money in the future and improve their economy. This has been done many times in the past, Dear Minister, the cancellation of BAĞ-KUR debts throughout Türkiye and the right to revival is a regulation that has been introduced before.
Dear Minister, in the Ministry of Labor and Social Security, especially labor inspectors, SSI inspectors, SSI inspectors, and in all other public institutions and organizations, inspectors, supervisors, auditors or career experts work as professionals. Of course, members of this profession - I am also a former audit personnel, as a former inspector - really need an improvement in their personnel rights.

It is not right to evaluate auditors, inspectors, experts and career professionals only with these qualifications; On the other hand, these are the state's
They are preparing for managerial positions that have an important service, that is, many managers in the public sector - when we look at their history in this context - are inspectors, auditors or specialists. Again, some of these friends of ours also train managers for the private sector. In other words, especially in the past years, we see that the top managers of many large corporate companies in the private sector are inspectors and accountants from the state. Again, Mr. Minister, it is obvious that members of this profession make great contributions and benefits, especially in terms of unregistered employment.
Increasing both allowance and daily amounts in Social Security. In other words, this is valid in SSI, in labor inspectors, and in the inspection boards of all other ministries. In 2025, 884 TL is paid daily, 1,547 TL is paid for accommodation, 1.75 times; In 2026, it was arranged to pay 1,157 TL daily and 2,198 TL accommodation fee, this time as 1.90 times. In today's conditions, especially regarding accommodation - this is valid for all ministries, Mr. Minister - our inspector friends in all ministries have serious problems with accommodation when they go to fulfill a duty given by the state. At this point, solving this problem in cooperation with our other ministries under your leadership will be of great benefit.
Again, our inspector friends at the Social Security Institution are making serious activities and contributions regarding unregistered employment. The fact that these SSI inspectors operate within a central organizational structure will not seriously support unregistered employment, will prevent unregistered employment and will contribute to the elimination of unregistered employment and the economic and financial structuring of the Social Security Institution.
The number of active insured in social security, which was 12 million 8 thousand 358 in 2002, reached 26 million 164 thousand 858 as of July 2025; The number of active insured has increased by 117.9 percent in the last twenty-three years.
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - Tell us how much our population has increased, Mr. Resul; The population increased by 30 million, friend.
İSMAİL GÜNEŞ (Uşak) - From 65 million to 85 million.
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - 95 million including Syrians.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - While the premiums of 5 million 826 thousand 136 people are paid by the state within the scope of general health insurance, 2 million 13 thousand 372 people pay their premiums themselves. The number of dependents within the scope of social security reached 33 million 985 thousand 769. 2 million 138 thousand 798 citizens who continue to work after retirement are subject to social security support premiums.
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - They cannot make ends meet because of poverty.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - In particular, the total revenues of the Social Security Institution were 3 trillion 962 billion in 2024, and as of the end of August 2025, the revenues were 3 trillion 503 billion. By the end of 2025, total revenues are expected to increase significantly compared to the previous year and reach 5 trillion 200 billion.

The total expenses of the Social Security Institution were 3 trillion 972 billion in 2024, and as of the end of September 2025, expenses were 4 trillion 66 billion lira. Total expenses are expected to be 5 trillion 618 billion lira by the end of 2025. The increases in pensions in 2024 and 2025, which were higher than expected, the increases in minimum salaries and holiday bonuses, the pensions, retirement and holiday bonuses paid due to the EYT application that came into force in March 2023, and the increases in health expenditures due to unforeseen changes, have led to an increase in SSI expenses, but it is seen that the income-expense balance is maintained. In the first nine months of 2025, the SSI deficit was 65.7 billion TL. As it is known, while passing from one year to the next, minimum wage, growth, inflation, retirement
Differences between periods in which payments are made occur due to monthly increases and various legislative changes that create financial impacts. For this reason, evaluating the financial structure of SSI in terms of its proportions in gross domestic product rather than nominal amounts will give a more accurate result.
Ratio of income to expenses. While SSI's revenue-expense coverage ratio was 71.5 percent in 2002, it reached 99.7 percent in 2024, and it is expected that this ratio will be in the range of 97-99 percent by the end of 2025. Even if there are factors that cause changes in income and expenses such as postponing premiums, increasing minimum salaries and holiday bonuses, and EYT regulation due to the earthquakes that we call the disaster of the millennium, centered in Kahramanmaraş, it should be taken into consideration that such a high income-coverage ratio is a significant success.
While the ratio of premium income, which is the performance indicator of the Social Security Institution, to cover pensions and health expenses was 60.9 percent in 2002, it has reached 77 percent at the end of 2024, and this rate is 77.3 percent as of September 2025.
An important indicator showing the financial sustainability of the social security system is the ratio of the social security system deficit to gross domestic product; This amounted to 2.2 percent.
Again, one of the important stages regarding SSI is the EYT regulation. As is known, applications regarding EYT have been continuing intensively since March 3, 2023. So, how many people have retired? Since March 3, 2023, 3.2 million of our citizens have retired and our employees have retired within a period of two and a half years. Of this, 2.6 million people retired within the scope of EYT, and 650 thousand people retired subject to normal retirement procedures. In this context, of course you will appreciate that, in a system where 450-500 thousand people retire annually, the retirement of 3.2 million people in two and a half years was made possible by the devoted efforts of the Social Security Institution employees. For this, on behalf of our beloved nation, I would like to thank the SSI staff in the person of our Minister.

Pensions vary depending on the number of premium days paid and premium-based earnings. Currently, the lowest SSI pension is around 16,881 lira and the highest SSI pension is around 109,944 lira. This is due to differences in the number of premium days paid and premium base, and the pensions of those with a higher number of premium days and higher earnings are also higher at this rate.
Another important indicator for us is the increase in the number of insured people. The number of active insured has increased by 115 percent and the number of retirees by 157 percent since 2002. The number of active insured people, which was 12 million in 2002, has reached 25.8 million today, and the number of retirees, which was 6.6 million, has reached approximately 17 million today. When the active-liability ratio is examined over the years as a result of the developments in the social security system, the active-liability ratio has been in the range of 1.78 to 2 since 2006, but today it has decreased to 1.6 after the EYT regulation. The ideal active-passive ratio is 4, and an active-passive ratio of at least 3 is considered reasonable so that the system can be cycled.
The number of workplaces employing workers with SSI within the scope of 4/A, which was 727,409 in 2002, increased to 2 million 238 thousand 16 as of October 2025. social
As a result of studies in the field of insurance, services provided, measures to increase the income of the social security system and policies carried out, it has enabled more effective, faster and higher quality services to be provided to citizens. SGK is one of the most successful institutions in e-government, thank you.
Many incentives and supports are implemented to ensure that our women participate in employment and remain in employment. In this context, it is of great importance to implement policies that will increase women's participation in employment and increase the participation of the female workforce. The labor force participation rate is 71.5 percent for men; It is 36.9 percent for women. Our greatest wish is for this to go even higher.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Is this success now?
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Combating unregistered employment is one of the main priorities. Currently, intensive fight against unregistered work and inspections are continuing by the Ministry's labor inspectors, SGK inspectors and SGK inspectors. The unregistered employment rate, which was 52.1 percent in 2002, was reduced to 25.9 percent in the second quarter of 2025 with the measures taken and the work carried out.
Retirees are the memory of a society.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Thanks to you, retirees became victims of this society!
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Our retirees, who have spent years of hard work and sacrifice, should be given the value they deserve, and in this context, it should be ensured that retirees are not affected by opportunism and exorbitant price increases. Our President.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - It is not the fault of the retiree, it is not the fault of the AKP government; Why are they retiring?
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - While the number of retirees in our country was 6.5 million in 2002, we said it would be 17 million by the end of 2025.

Today, there are important regulations made for retirees: It should be taken into account that retirees' holiday bonuses, the centenary payment of the republic, which is paid to retirees only once, and that pensions are always paid based on the amounts they deserve and are calculated - except for those who pay premiums based on the minimum wage. We would also like to remind you that the lower limit application introduced in 2019 was increased to 16,881 TL in July 2025.
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - It should be at least 35 thousand.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Is this what happened? Is the figure you find appropriate 16 thousand liras?
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Now, Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality has committed to market support to contribute to the home economy of low-income retirees living in Istanbul. How much money does he pay? How much money? Do you know how much you paid? You don't know. 833 lira, you pay 833 lira. (Noise from CHP benches)
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Tell me, what do you give?
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - He does what you cannot do, it's a shame!
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - How many retirees do you give to? You give it to 10 thousand retirees, 10 thousand retirees. 16 million people live in Istanbul, you give 833 liras to 10 thousand people, and you criticize the government here. First, go back and look at your own garden.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - The pension you give is 16 thousand liras, what is the hunger limit! What is the hunger limit?
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - As a state, do you compare yourself with the municipality? Then if you can't manage it, quit! Let alone social justice, welfare, health, etc.; If you can't manage it, quit! The municipality is trying to give you what you do not give.
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - Leave it now!
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - He is trying to do what you cannot do with his non-existent budget, you cannot criticize instead of thanking!
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - In Istanbul, "I will give 10 thousand lira market support to retirees." You ask for votes and give 833 liras to 10 thousand people. (Noise from CHP benches) So, according to your criteria, the number of poor retirees is limited to 10 thousand people; It is limited to 10 thousand people. Look at your own garden first.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Look at the ministries you manage.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Thank you, Mr. President.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - It's a shame, you pay a salary of 16 thousand liras and you criticize those who help you! Is such a thing possible!
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - Dear MPs.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - President, can such a thing happen!
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - One second, one second, friends.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - 16,881 lira pension, 27 thousand lira hunger limit.
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - Dear friends.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Leave the ministries you cannot manage, we will continue.
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - Dear friends.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - You cannot distribute water in municipalities, water!
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - If you cannot manage the country, liquidate it piece by piece; Liquidate the ministries now!
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - You cannot distribute water in municipalities, how will you govern the country! (Noise from CHP benches)
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - If you can't manage it, hand it over.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - You cannot collect garbage in municipalities, how will you govern the country!

SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Whatever ministry you cannot manage, leave it alone, we are ready to govern, step aside, that's enough, you have become a dark cloud over the nation!
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - May God protect us from the country you will rule!
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - What a municipality, friend!
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - Dear friends, is it over, is it over?
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - Collect garbage; garbage, garbage!
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Are you disturbed because we are doing what you cannot do!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Ask the Minister why 6 women died. Ask the Minister, ask; Why did 6 women die, why did 3 children die? The minister is here, ask.
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - Minister is here, ask.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - You ask, aren't you a member of parliament? Ask me.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Where were you when 29 workers died in Beşiktaş! Where were you brother!
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Those municipalities are trying to take under their wing the citizens in a difficult situation, they are trying to support them, why? Because you didn't do it, because you left those people hungry!
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - Where were you!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - You ask, aren't you the representative of the nation!
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Instead of criticizing, you will thank, that municipality is doing what you cannot do!
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Where were you, brother, when 29 people died in Beşiktaş?
CHAIRMAN MEHMET MUŞ - Our sufficiency for negotiation, our sufficiency for negotiation.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Thank you once and say, "May God bless you." and "May God bless you." also!
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - Where were you, where were you!
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - Friends, you.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - You are not ashamed, and you condemn these people to nothingness!
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - Our ability to negotiate, dear friends.
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - You speak shamelessly!
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Oh, you are the one speaking!
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - That's enough, friends, you've shouted at each other enough. So, let's calm down now.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. President, I would like to make a brief statement.
CHAIRMAN MEHMET MUŞ - Dear Mr. Ağbaba, there are some things on my screen, let me sort them out.
Friends, after this shouting session, we will continue where we left off.
Now, dear friends.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - This Resul's chemistry is also spoiled.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - No, Veli brother, it has not deteriorated at all. Why are you insulting me, why are you criticizing me?
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - One second.
Mr. Kurt, please.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - If you are going to criticize, criticize the Minister if you have a heart!
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - If I criticize, I will criticize you too.
SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - If you have a heart, criticize!
RESUL KURT (Adiyaman) - I criticize.

records.originalTurkish:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Bakanım, bugüne kadar her zaman şehrimiz Adıyaman'a ilişkin taleplerimize destek oldunuz, her konuda bizlere yoğun destek verdiniz, taleplerimize uygun bir şekilde tüm süreçlerde desteklerinizi gördük. SGK İl Müdürlüğü binamız ağır hasar almıştı, yıkılmıştı -ben de konuşmamda bahsettim- proje ve süreçlerine destek verdiniz ama şimdi bir SGK hizmet binasının temel atma töreni ve buna ilişkin ne zaman biteceği konusunda da sizden müjdeli haber bekliyoruz.
Teşekkür ederim.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Dear Minister, until today you have always supported our demands regarding our city Adıyaman, you have given us intense support in every issue, we have seen your support in all processes in accordance with our demands. Our SSI Provincial Directorate building was heavily damaged and destroyed - I also mentioned it in my speech - you supported the projects and processes, but now we are waiting for good news from you about the groundbreaking ceremony of a SSI service building and when it will be completed.
Thank you.

fields.Subject: 2026 Yılı Merkezi Yönetim Bütçe Kanunu Teklifi (1/280) ve 2024 Yılı Merkezi Yönetim Kesin Hesap Kanunu Teklifi (1/279) ile Sayıştay tezkereleri münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Bakanım, deprem bölgelerinden elinizi çekmediniz, her konuda desteklerinizi görüyoruz; bunun için teşekkür ederiz.
Kadim şehrimiz Adıyaman depremden etkilenen şehirlerden biri. İlimizde 844 ebeveyn kaybı yaşayan çocuğumuz var. Yine, bu çocukların 57'si koruyucu aileden yararlanıyor. Ebeveyn kaybı yaşayan 61 evladımız hakkında bakım tedbiri alınmıştır. 11 evladımız ebeveyn kaybı yanında uzuv kaybı yaşamıştır. Depremzede çocuklarımız ve aileler için hangi hizmetler veriliyor?
Yine, deprem travmasıyla ilgili psikolojik destekler veriliyor mu, hangi destekler veriliyor? Özellikle depremden ağır şekilde etkilenen 4 ilimizde, Adıyaman, Hatay, Kahramanmaraş ve Malatya illerimizde deprem ve afet sonrası gelişen travmalarla ilgili hangi çalışmalar yapılıyor? Buraya personel desteği, özellikle bu meslek alanında uzman personel desteğine ihtiyacımız var.
Teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Dear Minister, you did not withdraw from the earthquake zones, we see your support in every issue; thank you for this.
Our ancient city Adıyaman is one of the cities affected by the earthquake. We have 844 children who lost their parents in our province. Again, 57 of these children benefit from foster care. Care measures were taken for 61 of our children who lost their parents. 11 of our children experienced the loss of limbs as well as the loss of a parent. What services are provided for our children and families affected by the earthquake?
Again, is psychological support given regarding earthquake trauma, and what kind of support is given? What studies are being carried out regarding traumas that develop after earthquakes and disasters, especially in our 4 provinces that were heavily affected by the earthquake: Adıyaman, Hatay, Kahramanmaraş and Malatya? We need personnel support here, especially personnel support who are experts in this field of profession.
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Bakanım, deprem bölgelerinden elinizi çekmediniz, her konuda desteklerinizi görüyoruz; bunun için teşekkür ederiz.
Kadim şehrimiz Adıyaman depremden etkilenen şehirlerden biri. İlimizde 844 ebeveyn kaybı yaşayan çocuğumuz var. Yine, bu çocukların 57'si koruyucu aileden yararlanıyor. Ebeveyn kaybı yaşayan 61 evladımız hakkında bakım tedbiri alınmıştır. 11 evladımız ebeveyn kaybı yanında uzuv kaybı yaşamıştır. Depremzede çocuklarımız ve aileler için hangi hizmetler veriliyor?
Yine, deprem travmasıyla ilgili psikolojik destekler veriliyor mu, hangi destekler veriliyor? Özellikle depremden ağır şekilde etkilenen 4 ilimizde, Adıyaman, Hatay, Kahramanmaraş ve Malatya illerimizde deprem ve afet sonrası gelişen travmalarla ilgili hangi çalışmalar yapılıyor? Buraya personel desteği, özellikle bu meslek alanında uzman personel desteğine ihtiyacımız var.
Teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Dear Minister, you did not withdraw from the earthquake zones, we see your support in every issue; thank you for this.
Our ancient city Adıyaman is one of the cities affected by the earthquake. We have 844 children who lost their parents in our province. Again, 57 of these children benefit from foster care. Care measures were taken for 61 of our children who lost their parents. 11 of our children experienced the loss of limbs as well as the loss of a parent. What services are provided for our children and families affected by the earthquake?
Again, is psychological support given regarding earthquake trauma, and what kind of support is given? What studies are being carried out regarding traumas that develop after earthquakes and disasters, especially in our 4 provinces that were heavily affected by the earthquake: Adıyaman, Hatay, Kahramanmaraş and Malatya? We need personnel support here, especially personnel support who are experts in this field of profession.
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Başkanım, teşekkür ederiz.
Sayın Başkanım, Plan ve Bütçe Komisyonunun değerli üyeleri, Sayın Bakanım, kıymetli bürokratlar, çok değerli basın mensupları; hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Sözlerimin başında, C-130 askerî uçağımızın Gürcistan üzerinde düşmesi sonucu şehit olan kahraman Mehmetçiklerimize Yüce Allah'tan rahmet, ailelerine ve yakınlarına başsağlığı ve sabır diliyorum.
Öncelikle, kapsamlı sunumları için Sayın Bakanımıza ve bütçenin hazırlanmasında emek ve katkıları olan değerli bürokratlarımıza teşekkür ediyorum. Gençlik ve Spor Bakanlığımızın ülkemizin dört bir yanında gençlerimize, çocuklarımıza, spor camiamıza sunduğu hizmetler için buradan hassaten teşekkürlerimi sunuyorum.
Depremin ağır yükünü taşıyan kadim şehrimiz, memleketim, seçim bölgem Adıyaman'da gençlik ve spor altyapısının yeniden inşası noktasında gösterdiğiniz hassasiyet ve destek hemşehrilerimiz adına son derece kıymetlidir. Başta Adıyaman olmak üzere 6 Şubat asrın felaketinin yaşandığı tüm şehirlerimizde -11 şehrimizde- spor tesisleri depremin yükünü çekti; yeri geldi barınma imkânı sağladı, yeri geldi yardım malzemelerinin tasnif, depolama ve dağıtımı yapıldı; çocuklarımıza, ailelere bir nebze olsun sıcak bir yuva imkânı sağladı. Dolayısıyla depremle ilgili bu acı gerçeği yaşadıktan sonra spor tesislerini sadece bir spor tesisi olarak değil her zaman ülkemizin en önemli ihtiyaçlarından biri olarak görmek ve buna göre kurgulamak lazım.
Sayın Bakanım, deprem sonrası gençlerimizin sporla motivasyona ihtiyacı var. Bu konuda her zamanki destekleriniz için... Yine, sizden şehrimizin birazdan sayacağım spor tesislerine desteklerinizi rica ediyoruz. Adıyaman'da son dönemde başlatılan gençlik ve spor yatırımları için özellikle Yeni Sanayi Mahallesi'nde 200 seyirci kapasiteli yarı olimpik yüzme havuzunun zemin etüdü başladı. Biliyorsunuz, Örenli'de de bir deprem sonrası afet konutları yapıldı. Yine, İndere de Türkiye'nin en büyük şantiyesi, yaklaşık 16.500 konutun bulunduğu İndere afet konutları alanına 250 seyirci kapasiteli spor salonunda yer tahsisi bekleniyor. Sayın Bakanım, bu iki bölge yaklaşık 17-18 bin konutun bulunduğu bir bölge, burada 50 bine yakın insanımız barınacak. Dolayısıyla Örenli afet konutları ve İndere afet konutları alanına ivedi bir şekilde, hızlıca spor tesisleri bekliyoruz. Yine, Yeni Sanayi Mahallesi ve Şeref Cengiz İlkokulu bahçesine sentetik yüzeyli futbol sahaları yapılıyor, zemin etüdü ve ihale aşamasında. Adıyaman Stadyumu, biliyorsunuz, Sayın Bakanım, sizinle de bürokratlarınızla da çok istişare ettik, çok konuştuk; burada 10 bin seyirci kapasiteli betonarme tribün yapımının zemin etüdü başladı. Adıyaman'ımızda spor salonumuza, Adıyaman Stadyumu'na çok büyük bir ilgi olduğunu ve her
görüştüğümüz hemşehrimizin de 20 bin kapasiteye yükseltilmesi taleplerini ben buradan sizlere iletmiş oluyorum. Altınşehir Mahallesi'nde 765 seyirci kapasiteli spor salonunda ihale aşamasındayız; Gölbaşı Asfalt Mahallesi'nde 528 seyirci kapasiteli 6 antrenman salonu ihale aşamasında. Gölbaşı 500 seyirci kapasiteli yarı olimpik yüzme havuzunun yine zemin etüdü başladı.
Sayın Bakanım, geçtiğimiz günlerde şehrimizin önemli futbol takımlarından biri Kâhta 02 Bölgesel Amatör Lig takımımız, Ziraat Türkiye Kupası 3'üncü turunda Kasımpaşa'yı -biliyorsunuz- 3-1 mağlup ederek bir üst tura yükseldi; buradan da Kâhta'mızın gururunu alkışlıyorum. Kâhta'mız sporda çok başarılı bir ilçemiz. 5 bin seyirci kapasiteli futbol sahası ve ek tesislerin bir an önce tamamlanmasını talep ediyoruz. Bu yatırımlar, deprem sonrası sosyal hayatın canlanması, gençlerimizin spora erişiminin artması, Adıyaman'ın spor altyapısının güçlenmesi açısından büyük önem taşıyor. Destekleriniz için, bizim Adıyaman'daki bütün projeleri sahasına kadar, noktasına kadar tek tek takip ettiğiniz için teşekkür ediyorum.
Bazı projelerimizde yer tahsisi, ihale zemin etüdü süreçlerinin uzaması sahadaki ilerlemeyi yavaşlatıyor. Adıyaman gençliğinin bu yatırımlara acilen ihtiyacı var. Bu çerçevede, Örenli ve İndere afet konutları bölgesindeki 250 kişilik spor salonlarının yer tahsis süreçlerinin hızlandırılması -ki biraz önce belirttim, burada yaklaşık 50 bin vatandaşımız ikamet edecek- Altınşehir Spor Salonu, Frit Spor Salonu, Şeref Cengiz İlköğretim Okulu sentetik saha projelerinin ihale süreçlerinin hızlandırılması önem arz ediyor. Yine, biraz önce ifade ettim; Adıyaman'da yapımına başlanan, zemin etüdüne başlanan 10 bin seyirci kapasiteli stadyumun 20 bin kişiye yükseltilmesi noktasında bir talebimiz var.
Değerli Bakanım, Adıyaman'ın ihtiyaçları konusunda bu saydığımız devam eden projeler harici birtakım ihtiyaçlarımız var. Merkez İndere Mahallesi'nde bin seyirci kapasiteli olimpik yüzme havuzu, Merkez İndere Mahallesi'nde 100 yatak kapasiteli sporcu eğitim merkezi, yine, Merkez Yeni Mahalle'de kültür ve medeniyet kampı, Ova Kuyucak, Gazihan Dede su kamp eğitim merkezi, Gölbaşı Akçakaya Mahallesi kamp eğitim merkezi; bu projeler hem şehrimizin genç nüfusuna hem de deprem sonrası yeniden canlanan sosyal hayata çok büyük bir katkı sağlayacaktır. Adıyaman'ımızın spor ve gençlik altyapısının kalıcı şekilde güçlendirilmesi için bu taleplerimizin yatırım programına alınması hususunu önemle arz ediyoruz.
Sayın Bakanım, Adıyaman halkı adına gösterdiğiniz tüm destekler için teşekkür ediyor, devam eden projelerin hızlanması, yeni taleplerimizin hayata geçirilmesi konusunda katkılarınızı bekliyoruz. Depremin en ağır şekilde etkisini taşıyan kadim şehrimiz Adıyaman'ın gençliğiyle, sporcusuyla, kültürüyle yeniden ayağa kalkması için çalışmaya devam edeceğiz.
Sözlerime son verirken, 2026 yılı Bakanlık bütçesinin hayırlı olmasını diliyor, hazırunu saygıyla selamlıyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Dear President, thank you.
Mr. President, esteemed members of the Planning and Budget Commission, esteemed Minister, esteemed bureaucrats, esteemed members of the press; I greet you all with respect.
At the beginning of my words, I wish God's mercy to our heroic Turkish soldiers who were martyred as a result of the crash of our C-130 military plane over Georgia, and I offer my condolences and patience to their families and relatives.
First of all, I would like to thank our Minister for his comprehensive presentations and our valuable bureaucrats who made their efforts and contributions in the preparation of the budget. I would like to express my special thanks here for the services provided by our Ministry of Youth and Sports to our youth, children and sports community all over our country.
The sensitivity and support you have shown for the reconstruction of the youth and sports infrastructure in Adıyaman, our ancient city, my hometown and my constituency, which bore the heavy burden of the earthquake, is extremely valuable for our fellow citizens. Sports facilities in all our cities - 11 cities - where the disaster of February 6th century took place, especially in Adıyaman, bore the brunt of the earthquake; At times, shelter was provided; at times, relief materials were sorted, stored and distributed; It provided a somewhat warm home for our children and families. Therefore, after experiencing this painful truth about the earthquake, it is necessary to see sports facilities not only as a sports facility but as one of the most important needs of our country and to structure them accordingly.
Dear Minister, our young people need motivation through sports after the earthquake. Thank you for your usual support on this matter. Again, we ask for your support for the sports facilities of our city, which I will list shortly. Ground survey of the semi-Olympic swimming pool with a capacity of 200 spectators has started, especially in Yeni Sanayi Mahallesi, for the youth and sports investments recently launched in Adıyaman. As you know, disaster residences were built in Örenli after an earthquake. Again, İndere is Türkiye's largest construction site. It is expected that a place will be allocated in the sports hall with a capacity of 250 spectators in the İndere disaster housing area, where there are approximately 16,500 residences. Dear Minister, these two regions are a region with approximately 17-18 thousand residences, approximately 50 thousand people will be accommodated here. Therefore, we are expecting sports facilities in the areas of Örenli disaster residences and İndere disaster residences as soon as possible. Again, synthetic surface football fields are being built in Yeni Sanayi Mahallesi and Şeref Cengiz Primary School gardens, and are at the ground survey and tender stage. Adıyaman Stadium, you know, Mr. Minister, we consulted and talked a lot with you and your bureaucrats; The ground survey for the construction of the reinforced concrete tribune with a capacity of 10 thousand spectators has started here. There is a great interest in our sports hall and Adıyaman Stadium in Adıyaman and
I am hereby conveying to you the requests of our fellow countrymen with whom we met, to increase the capacity to 20 thousand. We are at the tender stage for the sports hall with a capacity of 765 spectators in Altınşehir District; 6 training halls with a capacity of 528 spectators in Gölbaşı Asfalt District are at the tender stage. The ground survey of the Gölbaşı semi-Olympic swimming pool with a capacity of 500 spectators has started again.

Dear Minister, recently our Kâhta 02 Regional Amateur League team, one of the important football teams of our city, defeated Kasımpaşa -as you know- 3-1 in the 3rd round of the Ziraat Turkish Cup and advanced to the next round; From here, I applaud the pride of our Kâhta. Our Kâhta district is very successful in sports. We demand that the football field with a capacity of 5 thousand spectators and additional facilities be completed as soon as possible. These investments are of great importance in terms of revitalizing social life after the earthquake, increasing our youth's access to sports, and strengthening Adıyaman's sports infrastructure. I would like to thank you for your support and for following all our projects in Adıyaman, one by one, from site to site.
In some of our projects, the extension of site allocation and tender ground survey processes slows down the progress in the field. Adıyaman youth urgently needs these investments. In this context, it is important to accelerate the land allocation processes of the 250-person sports halls in the Örenli and İndere disaster housing areas - as I have just stated, approximately 50 thousand citizens will reside here - and to accelerate the tender processes of the Altınşehir Sports Hall, Frit Sports Hall, Şeref Cengiz Primary School synthetic field projects. Again, I just stated; We have a request to increase the stadium with a capacity of 10 thousand spectators, the construction of which has started in Adıyaman and the ground survey of which has started, to 20 thousand people.
Dear Minister, regarding the needs of Adıyaman, we have some needs other than the ongoing projects we have mentioned. Olympic swimming pool with a capacity of 1000 spectators in Merkez İndere District, athlete training center with a capacity of 100 beds in Merkez İndere District, culture and civilization camp in Merkez Yeni District, Ova Kuyucak, Gazihan Dede water camp training center, Gölbaşı Akçakaya District camp training center; These projects will make a great contribution to both the young population of our city and the social life that revived after the earthquake. We strongly recommend that these demands be included in the investment program in order to permanently strengthen the sports and youth infrastructure of Adıyaman.
Dear Minister, we thank you for all the support you have shown on behalf of the people of Adıyaman, and we look forward to your contributions in accelerating the ongoing projects and realizing our new demands. We will continue to work to ensure that our ancient city Adıyaman, which bore the most severe impact of the earthquake, gets back on its feet with its youth, athletes and culture.
As I conclude my remarks, I wish the 2026 Ministry budget to be beneficial and I respectfully greet those present.

Dear Minister, our young people need motivation through sports after the earthquake. Thank you for your usual support on this matter. Again, we ask for your support for the sports facilities of our city, which I will list shortly. Ground survey of the semi-Olympic swimming pool with a capacity of 200 spectators has started, especially in Yeni Sanayi Mahallesi, for the youth and sports investments recently launched in Adıyaman. As you know, disaster residences were built in Örenli after an earthquake. Again, İndere is Türkiye's largest construction site. It is expected that a place will be allocated in the sports hall with a capacity of 250 spectators in the İndere disaster housing area, where there are approximately 16,500 residences. Dear Minister, these two regions are a region with approximately 17-18 thousand residences, approximately 50 thousand people will be accommodated here. Therefore, we are expecting sports facilities in the areas of Örenli disaster residences and İndere disaster residences as soon as possible. Again, synthetic surface football fields are being built in Yeni Sanayi Mahallesi and Şeref Cengiz Primary School gardens, and are at the ground survey and tender stage. Adıyaman Stadium, you know, Mr. Minister, we consulted and talked a lot with you and your bureaucrats; The ground survey for the construction of the reinforced concrete tribune with a capacity of 10 thousand spectators has started here. There is a great interest in our sports hall and Adıyaman Stadium in Adıyaman and
I am hereby conveying to you the requests of our fellow countrymen with whom we met, to increase the capacity to 20 thousand. We are at the tender stage for the sports hall with a capacity of 765 spectators in Altınşehir District; 6 training halls with a capacity of 528 spectators in Gölbaşı Asfalt District are at the tender stage. The ground survey of the Gölbaşı semi-Olympic swimming pool with a capacity of 500 spectators has started again.

Dear Minister, recently our Kâhta 02 Regional Amateur League team, one of the important football teams of our city, defeated Kasımpaşa -as you know- 3-1 in the 3rd round of the Ziraat Turkish Cup and advanced to the next round; From here, I applaud the pride of our Kâhta. Our Kâhta district is very successful in sports. We demand that the football field with a capacity of 5 thousand spectators and additional facilities be completed as soon as possible. These investments are of great importance in terms of revitalizing social life after the earthquake, increasing our youth's access to sports, and strengthening Adıyaman's sports infrastructure. I would like to thank you for your support and for following all our projects in Adıyaman, one by one, from site to site.
In some of our projects, the extension of site allocation and tender ground survey processes slows down the progress in the field. Adıyaman youth urgently needs these investments. In this context, it is important to accelerate the land allocation processes of the 250-person sports halls in the Örenli and İndere disaster housing areas - as I have just stated, approximately 50 thousand citizens will reside here - and to accelerate the tender processes of the Altınşehir Sports Hall, Frit Sports Hall, Şeref Cengiz Primary School synthetic field projects. Again, I just stated; We have a request to increase the stadium with a capacity of 10 thousand spectators, the construction of which has started in Adıyaman and the ground survey of which has started, to 20 thousand people.
Dear Minister, regarding the needs of Adıyaman, we have some needs other than the ongoing projects we have mentioned. Olympic swimming pool with a capacity of 1000 spectators in Merkez İndere District, athlete training center with a capacity of 100 beds in Merkez İndere District, culture and civilization camp in Merkez Yeni District, Ova Kuyucak, Gazihan Dede water camp training center, Gölbaşı Akçakaya District camp training center; These projects will make a great contribution to both the young population of our city and the social life that revived after the earthquake. We strongly recommend that these demands be included in the investment program in order to permanently strengthen the sports and youth infrastructure of Adıyaman.
Dear Minister, we thank you for all the support you have shown on behalf of the people of Adıyaman, and we look forward to your contributions in accelerating the ongoing projects and realizing our new demands. We will continue to work to ensure that our ancient city Adıyaman, which bore the most severe impact of the earthquake, gets back on its feet with its youth, athletes and culture.
As I conclude my remarks, I wish the 2026 Ministry budget to be beneficial and I respectfully greet those present.

RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Bakanım, Türkiye'de mevcutta kaç federasyon vardır? Bu federasyonlara bağlı kaç sporcu bulunmaktadır? Ülkemiz son yirmi üç yılda kaç madalya almıştır? Bunların dağılımları nasıldır?
Teşekkür ederim.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Dear Minister, how many federations are there in Türkiye? How many athletes are affiliated with these federations? How many medals has our country received in the last twenty-three years? What is their distribution?
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Sayın Başkanım, Plan ve Bütçe Komisyonunun değerli üyeleri, Sayın Bakanım, kıymetli bürokratlar, çok değerli basın mensupları; hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Kapsamlı sunumları için Sayın Bakanımıza, bütçenin hazırlanmasında katkıları ve emekleri için de ilgili bürokratlara teşekkür ediyorum.
2002'de 11,9 milyar dolar, 2018'de 35,9 milyar dolar, 2024 yılında 61 milyar dolar, 2025 yılındaysa tahmini 64 milyar dolar olan turizm gelirleri dikkate alındığında, yirmi üç yılda dolar bazında yaklaşık 6 kata varan turizm gelirlerinde bir artış yaşanmıştır. Türkiye, doğal güzellikleri, tarihî zenginlikleri, kültürel mirası, medeniyet mirası, zengin mutfak kültürü, yöresel lezzetleri ve coğrafi çeşitliliğiyle turizm açısından dünya genelinde önemli bir konumda yer almaktadır. Bakanlığınızın yaptığı çalışmalarla ve geliştirdiği projelerle turizm potansiyelinde büyük bir ilerleme sağlanmıştır.
Sayın Bakanım, öncelikle, Adıyaman ilimize bugüne kadar her zaman olduğu gibi gösterdiğiniz ilgi ve desteklerden dolayı teşekkürlerimi sunuyorum. 6 Şubat depremlerinde Adıyaman ilimizdeki tarihî eserlerimizde ve kültürel varlıklarımızda meydana gelen hasarlarla ilgili kapsamlı çalışmalar yürütülmektedir. Sayın Bakanımız ve Bakanlık bürokratlarıyla da bu konuda sürekli iletişim hâlindeyiz, her zaman desteklerini görüyoruz, birlikte takip ediyoruz. Depremde ağır hasar alan Adıyaman Ulucami, Kab Camisi, Besni Kurşunlu Camisi ve diğer tarihî cami ve yapıların
ayağa kaldırılması için rölöve ve restorasyon projeleri hazırlanmış, koruma kurulu tarafından onaylanmış restorasyon süreçleri devam etmektedir. Biz de Adıyaman'a gittiğimizde zaman zaman bu restorasyon süreçlerini yerinde inceliyoruz. Özellikle Adıyaman Ulu Camisi, Kap Camisi şehrimiz için büyük önemi olan eserlerimizdir.
Tarihî Cumhuriyet İlkokulu binası Millî Eğitim Bakanlığından Kültür ve Turizm Bakanlığına devredildi; bu binanın hem İl Kültür Müdürlüğü hem de müze olarak değerlendirilmesiyle ilgili çalışmalar, restorasyon süreci devam etmektedir. Tarihî Cumhuriyet İlkokulu Binası şehrimizin kültürel mirasını ve tarihini yansıtan önemli bir merkez hâline gelecektir. Depremde hasar alan tarihî ve kültürel miraslarımızın restorasyon süreçlerinde gösterdiğiniz ilgi ve alakaya teşekkür ediyor ve devam eden çalışmaların hızlandırılması için de desteklerinizi bekliyoruz.
Adıyaman ilimizde kütüphane ihtiyaçlarına yönelik yatırım programına alınan ve süreci başlatılan projelerin yanında merkez İndere, Kâhta, Sincik, Çelikhan ve Gerger ilçelerimizde modern, kapsamlı kütüphane binalarına ihtiyaç duyulmaktadır.
Adıyaman ve çevresinde yapılan arkeolojik kazılar, bölgede tarih öncesi dönemlerden beri insan yerleşimlerinin var olduğunu göstermiştir. Perre, Palanlı, Haydaran ve Turuş'ta yapılan kazılar bölgede üst paleolitik döneme tarihlenen mağara yerleşimlerini ortaya çıkarmıştır. Palanlı köyündeki Palanlı Mağarası'nın milattan önce 40000 yıllarında kullanıldığı tahmin edilmektedir. Diğer bölgelerde yapılan kazılarda da yine 3000'li yıllara tarihlenen kalıntılara ulaşılmıştır. Nemrut Dağı, Perre Antik Kenti, Arsameia Antik Kenti, Cendere Köprüsü ve Kanyonu, Kızılin Kanyonu, Karakuş Tümülüsü, Kâhta Kalesi gibi çok sayıda tarihî esere ev sahipliği yapmaktayız. Ayrıca Safvan Bin Muattal Külliyesi de inanç turizmi bakımından önemli bir değerimizdir.
Sayın Bakanım, değerli milletvekilleri; şehrimizde önemli bir makam olan Apaziz'in türbesi de depremde hasar gördü. Alevi vatandaşlarımızın önemli bir ilgi ve alaka gösterdiği bu türbemizin onarımına desteklerinizi bekliyoruz. Yine, Adıyaman merkez Kömür beldesinde on sekiz yıldır tamamlanamayan bir cemevimiz var. Kömür ve çevre köyler için önemli olan bu cemevine Alevi- Bektaşi Kültür ve Cemevi Başkanlığımızın destek ve katkılarını bekliyoruz. Sayın Cemevi Başkanımıza bu konuda destek olursak bölgedeki bir ihtiyacı da gidermiş oluruz.
Sayın Bakanım, değerli milletvekilleri; görüldüğü üzere Adıyaman, tarihî zenginlik bakımından, kültür bakımından önemli bir kadim şehirdir. Ayrıca önemle belirtmek gerekir ki şehrimiz zengin bir mozaik kültürüne sahiptir. Samosatalı mozaik sanatçısı Zosimos’un doğduğu topraklarda, Kommagene’nin 5 büyük kentinden 1'i olan Perre Antik Kenti'nde 5'inci yüzyıla ait ve ortasında cennet sahnesinin betimlendiği 133 metrekarelik mozaik önemli bir eserdir. Özellikle belirtmek gerekir ki Zeugma Mozaik Müzesindeki eserlerin birçoğunun hocası, ustası Adımayan Samsatlı Samosatalı'dır. Zeugma’da Aphrodite’in Doğuşu mozaiğini yapan Samosatalı Zosimos başta olmak üzere mozaik ustalarının çok sayıda uyuyan eseri olduğuna inanıyoruz. Nekropolüyle birlikte şimdilik yüzölçümü 82 hektar olarak belirlenen Adıyaman Perre Antik Kenti'nde 1980’lerde önemli mozaikler keşfedilmiş ancak bu keşifler, korunabilmesine ilişkin olanaklar sağlanmadığı için gün yüzüne çıkarılamamış. Üzerine 50-60 santim kalındığında toprak kapatılan Perre’nin toprak altındaki varlığı bilinen binlerce metrekare mozaiği gün yüzüne çıkmayı bekliyor. Adıyaman’da Perre Antik Kenti bölgesinde 10 bin metrekare kapalı alana sahip yeni bir müzeye ve bu kapsamda 5 bin metrekare Samosatalı Zosımos Mozaik Müzesinin planlamaya alınmasına ihtiyacımız var. Ayrıca, Adıyaman’da turistik tesis ve otel yapımı için de turizm arsası tahsisi, devlet teşvik ve desteklerinin verilmesi şehrimizin turizm potansiyeline büyük katkı sağlayacaktır.
Perre Kamulaştırma Projesi'nin 2'nci etabının 2026 bütçe planına alınması ve turizm gelişme bölgesi süreçlerinin hızlandırılması önem
arz etmektedir.
Sayın Bakanım, Nemrut Dağı'nın tanıtımının yeterince yapılamadığına inanıyorum. Gerçekten büyük bir medeniyete ev sahipliği yapıyor Adıyaman. Kommagene Krallığı, barışın, huzurun, dönemindeki hem Roma hem İran tarafıyla ilişkileri olan barışçıl bir krallık ve iki yüz yıl hiç savaşmadan ayakta kalan bir krallık. Bu bölgeyi tanıtmak, bu bölgeden miras kalan eserleri tanıtmak çok önem arz ediyor. Bu kapsamda TGA'yla toplantılar gerçekleştiriyoruz, çok büyük desteklerini görüyoruz, Bakanlığınıza müteşekkiriz. Bu desteklerin daha artırılmasını, özellikle profesyonel rehberlik hizmetlerinin sağlanmasını, Adıyaman'ımızın eşsiz kültürel ve tarihî varlıklarının turizm programlarına daha yoğun şekilde dâhil edilerek seyahat acenteleri ve tur operatörleriyle iş birliğinin sağlanması önem arz ediyor. Bu konuda da desteklerinizi bekliyoruz.
Sayın Bakanım, ülkemizin sanatı, kültürü, tarihî, gastronomiyi tek bir noktada birleştirmeyi başaran Türkiye'nin en kapsamlı festivali olan Türkiye Kültür Yolu Festivali Bakanlığınız tarafından büyük bir başarıyla düzenleniyor. Yine, terörsüz Türkiye süreciyle birlikte Doğu ve Güneydoğu Anadolu illerinde "Bir Anadolu Şenliği" adı altında düzenlenen etkinlikler için, projeler için sizi ve Bakanlığınızı, ekibinizi tebrik ediyorum.
8 Kasım 2025 Cumartesi günü Adıyaman'da ünlü şefler Ramazan Bingöl, Esra Tokelli, Ayvaz Akbacak, Hatice Nur Ege'nin de katılımlarıyla gerçekleştirilen Adıyaman'da kadınların yöresel lezzetlerini sergilediği Adıyaman Mutfak Festivali büyük bir ilgi gördü. Adıyaman Mutfak Festivali'yle kentin gastronomi potansiyeli bakımından önemli olduğunu gördük.
Sayın Bakanım, seçim bölgem, memleketim Adıyaman tarihî doğal güzellikleri, kültürel zenginlikleriyle Türkiye'nin turizm potansiyeli yüksek şehirlerinden birisidir. Adıyaman mutfağı Güneydoğu Anadolu'nun zengin lezzetlerini yansıtmaktadır. Çiğ köftemiz, Adıyaman tavası, Besni tavası, hitap, dövmeç, içli köfte, ekşili köfte, parmak kebabı, cılbır, yapıştırma, şillik gibi çok sayıda yöresel lezzetleriyle bir gastronomi şehridir. Bu kapsamda Adıyaman'ın hem deprem sonrası moral ve motivasyonunun artırılması hem de şehrimizin gastronomi bakımından hak ettiği yere gelebilmesi için Adıyaman'ın Türkiye Kültür Yolu Festivali veyahut da Bir Anadolu Şenliği kapsamına alınması önem arz etmektedir.
6 Şubat depremlerinden olumsuz etkilenen turizm sektörü finans sıkıntısı çekiyor. Dolayısıyla, depremde hasar alan otellerin yeniden ayağa kaldırılabilmesi için düşük faizli kamu bankalarından sağlanacak imkânlarla turizm otelcilik sektörünün ayağa kalkması yönünde...
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
OTURUM BAŞKANI NİLGÜN ÖK - Bir dakika daha sürenizi uzatıyorum.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Hemen kısaca arz edeyim.
Sayın Bakanım, bir diğer turizm sektöründe özellikle konaklama vergisi ve "booking.com"la ilgili sıkıntılar var. Konaklama vergisi, biliyorsunuz, esasen kazanç üzerinden alınıyor ama bir, iki, üç yıldız, dört yıldız, beş yıldız gibi otellerde sağlanan hizmetin sadece yıldız sayısına veya otelin niteliğine göre maktu bir tutardan alınması önem arz ediyor. "Booking" gibi satış kanallarında da KDV, konaklama vergisi dâhil tutar üzerinden komisyon alındığı için hem devletimiz hem turizm sektörü büyük zarar görüyor. Bu konuda da mutlaka bir çalışma yapılması gerektiği ve komisyonların bir sınırlandırmaya tabi olması, ayrıca KDV, konaklama vergisi hariç tutar üzerinden komisyon alınması yönünde çalışma yapılması gerekiyor.
Tekrar bütçemizin hayırlı olmasını diliyor, hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Mr. President, esteemed members of the Planning and Budget Commission, esteemed Minister, esteemed bureaucrats, esteemed members of the press; I greet you all with respect.
I would like to thank our Minister for his comprehensive presentations and the relevant bureaucrats for their contributions and efforts in the preparation of the budget.
Considering the tourism revenues of 11.9 billion dollars in 2002, 35.9 billion dollars in 2018, 61 billion dollars in 2024 and an estimated 64 billion dollars in 2025, there has been an increase in tourism revenues of approximately 6 times in dollar terms in twenty-three years. Türkiye is in an important position in the world in terms of tourism with its natural beauties, historical riches, cultural heritage, civilization heritage, rich culinary culture, local flavors and geographical diversity. A great progress has been made in the tourism potential with the work carried out and the projects developed by your Ministry.
Dear Minister, first of all, I would like to thank you for the interest and support you have shown to our Adıyaman province, as always. Comprehensive studies are being carried out regarding the damage to our historical monuments and cultural assets in Adıyaman province during the February 6 earthquakes. We are in constant communication with our Minister and the Ministry bureaucrats on this issue, we always receive their support, and we follow up together. Adıyaman Grand Mosque, Kab Mosque, Besni Kurşunlu Mosque and other historical mosques and buildings that were heavily damaged in the earthquake
Survey and restoration projects have been prepared for its restoration, and the restoration processes approved by the conservation board are continuing. When we go to Adıyaman, we examine these restoration processes on site from time to time. Especially Adıyaman Grand Mosque and Kap Mosque are our works of great importance for our city.
The historical Cumhuriyet Primary School building was transferred from the Ministry of National Education to the Ministry of Culture and Tourism; The work and restoration process to evaluate this building as both the Provincial Directorate of Culture and a museum is continuing. The Historical Cumhuriyet Primary School Building will become an important center reflecting the cultural heritage and history of our city. We thank you for your interest and concern in the restoration processes of our historical and cultural heritage damaged in the earthquake and we expect your support to accelerate the ongoing work.
In addition to the projects that have been included in the investment program and the process has been initiated for library needs in Adıyaman province, modern, comprehensive library buildings are needed in the central İndere, Kâhta, Sincik, Çelikhan and Gerger districts.
Archaeological excavations carried out in Adıyaman and its surroundings have shown that human settlements have existed in the region since prehistoric times. Excavations in Perre, Palanlı, Haydaran and Turuş have revealed cave settlements dating back to the upper paleolithic period in the region. It is estimated that Palanlı Cave in Palanlı village was used around 40000 BC. In excavations carried out in other regions, ruins dating back to the 3000s were also found.

We host many historical monuments such as Mount Nemrut, Perre Ancient City, Arsameia Ancient City, Cendere Bridge and Canyon, Kızılin Canyon, Karakuş Tumulus, Kâhta Castle. In addition, Safvan Bin Muattal Complex is an important value in terms of religious tourism.
Dear Minister, dear MPs; The tomb of Apaziz, which is an important authority in our city, was also damaged in the earthquake. We expect your support for the repair of this tomb, to which our Alevi citizens show great interest and concern. Again, we have a cemevi in ​​Adıyaman's central Kömür town that has not been completed for eighteen years. We expect the support and contributions of our Alevi-Bektashi Culture and Cemevi Presidency for this cemevi, which is important for Kömür and surrounding villages. If we support our esteemed Cemevi President in this regard, we will also meet a need in the region.
Dear Minister, dear MPs; As can be seen, Adıyaman is an ancient city that is important in terms of historical richness and culture. It should also be noted that our city has a rich mosaic culture. The 133 square meter mosaic with a heavenly scene depicted in the middle, dating back to the 5th century in the Ancient City of Perre, one of the 5 major cities of Commagene, in the land where the mosaic artist Zosimos from Samosata was born, is an important work. It should be especially noted that the teacher and master of many of the works in the Zeugma Mosaic Museum is Adımayan Samsatlı Samosatalı. We believe that there are many dormant works of mosaic masters, especially Zosimos of Samosata, who made the Birth of Aphrodite mosaic in Zeugma. Important mosaics were discovered in the Adıyaman Perre Ancient City, whose surface area is currently determined as 82 hectares including its necropolis, in the 1980s, but these discoveries could not be unearthed because the facilities for their preservation were not provided. Perre's thousands of square meters of mosaics, which are known to exist underground, are waiting to be unearthed. We need a new museum with a closed area of ​​10 thousand square meters in the Perre Ancient City region in Adıyaman, and in this context, the 5 thousand square meter Zosimos Mosaic Museum of Samosata should be included in the planning. In addition, allocating tourism land and providing government incentives and supports for the construction of touristic facilities and hotels in Adıyaman will greatly contribute to the tourism potential of our city.
It is important to include the second phase of the Perre Expropriation Project in the 2026 budget plan and to accelerate the tourism development zone processes.
It offers.
Dear Minister, I believe that Mount Nemrut has not been promoted sufficiently. Adıyaman is home to a truly great civilization. The Kingdom of Commagene is a peaceful kingdom with peace and tranquility, relations with both the Roman and Iranian sides of its time, and a kingdom that survived for two hundred years without any war. It is very important to introduce this region and the works inherited from this region. In this context, we hold meetings with TGA, we see their great support, we are grateful to your Ministry.

It is important to increase these supports, especially to provide professional guidance services, to include the unique cultural and historical assets of Adıyaman more intensively in tourism programs and to ensure cooperation with travel agencies and tour operators. We expect your support in this regard.
Dear Minister, Türkiye's most comprehensive festival, Turkey's most comprehensive festival, which manages to combine our country's art, culture, history and gastronomy at a single point, is organized by your Ministry with great success. Again, I congratulate you, your Ministry and your team for the events and projects organized under the name of "An Anatolian Festival" in the Eastern and Southeastern Anatolian provinces along with the terror-free Türkiye process.
Adıyaman Culinary Festival, which was held in Adıyaman on Saturday, November 8, 2025, with the participation of famous chefs Ramazan Bingöl, Esra Tokelli, Ayvaz Akbacak, Hatice Nur Ege, and where women exhibited their local delicacies, attracted great attention. With the Adıyaman Culinary Festival, we saw that the city is important in terms of gastronomy potential.
Dear Minister, my constituency, my hometown Adıyaman is one of the cities with high tourism potential in Türkiye with its historical, natural beauties and cultural riches. Adıyaman cuisine reflects the rich flavors of Southeastern Anatolia. It is a gastronomy city with many local delicacies such as raw meatballs, Adıyaman pan, Besni pan, seville, tattooç, stuffed meatballs, sour meatballs, finger kebab, cılbır, pasting and şıllik. In this context, it is important to include Adıyaman within the scope of the Turkish Culture Road Festival or an Anatolian Festival in order to increase the morale and motivation of Adıyaman after the earthquake and to bring our city to the place it deserves in terms of gastronomy.
The tourism sector, which was negatively affected by the February 6 earthquakes, is suffering from financial difficulties. Therefore, the aim is to revive the tourism and hotel industry with the opportunities provided by low-interest public banks in order to revive the hotels damaged in the earthquake.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION NİLGÜN ÖK - I will extend your time for one more minute.
RESUL KURT (Adıyaman) - Let me briefly explain.
Dear Minister, there are problems in another tourism sector, especially regarding accommodation tax and "booking.com". As you know, accommodation tax is mainly collected on earnings, but it is important that the service provided in hotels such as one, two, three star, four star, five star is collected from a fixed amount only according to the number of stars or the quality of the hotel. Since commissions are charged on the amount including VAT and accommodation tax in sales channels such as "Booking", both our state and the tourism sector suffer great losses. A study needs to be done on this issue, commissions should be subject to a limitation, and commissions should be collected on the amount excluding VAT and accommodation tax.
Once again, I hope our budget will be beneficial and I greet you all with respect.
